title: Uganda mu bifaananyi 35
content:
Bingi ebyabaddewo mu ggwanga ku Lwokusatu nga June 16,2021 kyokka waliwo ebyakize ku binnaabyo.

Mu bino mwe muli okulonda baminisita okugenda mu maaso mu palamenti n'okutongoza oluguudo oluzimbibwa Uganda n'eggwanga lya DR Congo. Tukuleetedde ebimu ku bifaananyi okukulaga ebyabaddeyo

_________________

Palamenti ekoma leero ku Lwokuna nga June 17,2021 okwekkeeneenya kabineeti ya pulezidenti museveni ey'ekisanja ekya 2021/2026. Okwekkeneenya baminisita kwatandika kubadde kugenda mu maaso okuva ku ntandikwa ya wiiki eno.

Ku Lwokusatu baminisita abaakalondebwa baalabikako eri akakiiko ka palamenti akavunaanyizibwa ku by'okukakasa abalondeddwa,okumanya oba bayiseemu oba nedda.

Baminisita bano tubakuleetedde nga batuuka ku palamenti n'engeri gye baalabise mu maaso g'akakiiko nga balinda okumanya ebyavuddeyo.

Pulezidenti Yoweri Kaguta Museveni ne munne owa DR Congo Felix Tshisekedi batemye evuunike ery’enguudo uganda z'egenda okuzimba e Congo ezibalirirwamu obukadde bwa ssente za america 330.

Pulezidenti, mukulu munne amulindedde ku nsalo e Mpondwe mu Disitulikiti y’e Kasese gyebasoose okutongoza olutindo olugatta Uganda ku DR Congo.

title: Kafulu mu kufuuwa emirere akomyewo mu ggwanga
content:
KAFULU mu kufuuwa omulere, Isaiah Katumwa olutonnye ku ekisaawe e Ntebe, n’awaga.
Ono abadde mu America gye yagenda mu 2019 era abadde akola guno na guli wabula ng’afunawo akadde akafuuwa omulere naddala
ng’ali ku mutimbagano.
Abamu babitebya nti akomeddewo ddala ate abalala nti yapangisiddwa okuyimba ku kivvulu kya ‘Jazz’ nti era olunaakimala ng’addayo ku kyeyo. Bwe yatonnye ku kisaawe ky’ennyonyi e Ntebe, yatageezezza nga bw’abadde asubwa Uganda nga n’abeerimbika mu kufuuwa omureere nga bawoza nti yagenda, ke kaseera beekaabireko kuba akomyewo na nkuba mpya.

title: Ebifaananyi  poliisi ng'ekwata ababaka ba palamenti  abakazi
content:
Bya Musasi Waffe
Biibino ebifaananyi ebiraga poliisi engeri gye yakuttemu ababaka ba palamenti abakazi 11 abaabadde beekalakaasizza wabweru wa palamenti eggulo.
Bano baabadde beekalakaasizza wabweru wa palamenti nga bawakanya engeri gye balemesebwamu emikolo gy’okukuza olunaku lw’abakyala.

title: Abantu 14 balumiziddwa mu bubbi bwa pikipiki
content:
ABANTU 14 be balumiziddwa mu bubbi bwa pikipiki obw'enjawulo obuzze bubaawo mu Kampala n'emiriraano.
Okuva mu June w'omwaka oguwedde okutuusa kati, pikipiki ezisoba mu 40, ze zaakabbibwa era ng'abantu 14 banyiga biwundu, era nga poliisi yaakakwatako 5 abagambibwa okuba ababbi.
Mu kikwekweto ekikoleddwa e Lubowa mu Ndejje mu Ssaabagabo Makindye e Wakiso, era bazudde ppikipiki emu nnamba UMA 663 HM egambibwa okuba enzibe .
Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala, Racheal Kawala, agambye nti omuyiggo gw'abantu abalala, gukolebwa okusobola okumalirawo ddala obubondo buno.

title: Bebecool alubaamu ye empya emuwuuba
content:
BIG Size Bebe Cool, olutambi lwe olupya lumuwuuba. Luno yaluyise Breaking The Chains, lw’agenda okufulumya mu butongole omwezi guno nga guggwaako era agamba lumumazeeko akawumbi k’ensimbi kalamba okulukolako.
Ku Ssande, yayise abawagizi be (Team Gagamel) e Kiwatule okutema empenda butya ennyimba ku lutambi luno bwe zigenda okukwatayo.
Ennyimba entono ze yaakafulumyako okuli; Circumference ne Motivation tezinnasensera bawagizi be nga y’emu ku nsonga eyamuyisizza abawagizi be, basale amagezi ku kiddako.
Mu lukungaana lwe lumu, Bebe Cool yabasabye okumuyiirawo omubiri naddala mu biseera bino ng’okulonda kwa bonna mu Uganda kusembedde. Oba wano yabadde ategeeza ki?

title: Emizannyo gy'abaliko obulemu giyingidde olunaku olw'okusatu e Masaka
content:
Egyazanyiddwa mu mpaka z'abaliko obulemu

Okukanyuga akazito (short put)

1. F46 Joash Ainebyona 8.20m

2. F46 Irampaye Foste 4.72

3. F44 Kinobe Wahabu 6.27

4. F44 Moize Paskari 5.42

Okukanyuga olunyago (Javelin)

1. Chebet charity 13.30m

2. Brenda Nabwire 13.10m

3. Diana Muwanguzi 10.25m

Showdown (Bawala)

Makerere university 11-18 MUBS

Kyambogo university 16-14 Gulu university

Balenzi

Makerere university 14-16 MUBS

Kyambogo university 13-13 Gulu university

Goal Ball

Kyambogo university 5-2 MUBS

Makerere university 2-0 Gulu university

PULEZIDENTI w'ekibiina ekiddukanya emizannyo gy'abaliko obulemu mu ggwanga ekya Uganda National Paralympic Committee Hon. Mpindi Bumaali asabye bannabyamizannyo abaliko obulemu okutwala ebyemizannyo nga omulimu okusobola okutumbuula embeera zaabwe ez'ebyenfuna.

okukasuka obuzito

Bino Bumaali yabyogeredde mu mizannyo gyabaliko obulemu egigenda mu maaso mu kibuga Masaka nga giyingidde Olunaku olwokusatu. “ ebyemizannyo Kati gwafuuka mulimu gwenyini ogusasula ekiralu singa oba otaddemu amaanyi n'oguzanyira ku daala lyensi yonna”. Bumaali bweyagambye.

Bumaali yayongeddeko nti nga ekibiina beetegefu okugenda mu buli kasonda k'eggwanga nga bafeffeta ebitone ebyenjawulo mu bantu abaliko obulemu yadde nga emirundi mingi ensimbi tezibasobozesa. “ abavubuka bangi abaliko obulemu abatafuna mukisa kulaga bitone byabwe, naye bwetutegeka emizannyo bwegiti mu bitundu byeggwanga ebyenjawulo tuzuula abavubuka bangi naye olwebbula lyensimbi tuba tetusobola kutuuka ku buli omu.

Empaka z'obugaali

Mu mizannyo egyazanyiddwa Olunaku lw'eggulo Ayuubu Kiruyi owa Kyambogo university yeyasinze Okukanyuga akazito mu mutendera gwa university ate Joash Ainebyona owa district ye Isingiro nanywa mu banne akendo mu kukanyuga olunyago nga Ono yakanyuze mmita 8.20 naddirirwa Foste Irampaye owa mmita 4.72.

Kyambogo University yeefuse emizannyo gya goal ball nga yakubye MUBS 5-2 ate Makerere university nekuba Gulu university 2-0 neyesogga oluzannya oluddako.

Emizannyo gyakukomekkerezebwa Olunaku olwenkya nomukolo ogwokugaba emidaali nebikopo.

title: AGABUUTIKIDDE FULL BULLETIN
content: Omuwendo gw'abayizi abafudde oluvanyuma lwa nabbambula 'omuliro ogwakute ekisulo ky'abayizi abalenzi ab'ekibiina Kya Top ne P.1 ku ssomero lya kasaana junior School mu division ya Nyendo Mukungwe mu kibuga Masaka gulinnye. Mu kiseera kino abaana abaafa baweze musanvu. ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Abasuubuzi b’e Nuuni abegattira mu kibiina kya Fish Maws and Traders Association Uganda limited bakaabidde mu kakiiko ka Palamenti ak’ebyobulimi n’obulunzi bwebabadde balombojja okusomozebwa kwebayitamu omuli n’omusolo ogubabinikibwa nga guno gubalese batubidde. ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Omulamuzi Alice Komuhangi owa kkooti ewozesa emisango jabakalintalo n'abatujju eya International Crimes Division asingisizza abagalana bannansi ya American emisango mukaaga ejekuusa ku kukukusa ebugye n'okulitulugunya era nabalagira okusasula okusibwa emyezi esatu mu kkomera n'okuliwa obukadde 105m. ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Minisitule y’ebyettaka egenda mu maaso n’okwogerezeganya n’essiga eddamuzi okulaba engeri gyebasobola okwanguyirizaamu okuwuliriza emisango gy’ettaka.Byogeddwa Judith Nalule Nabakooba minisita w’ebyettaka,amayumba n’okuteekerateekera ebibuga bwabadde aggulawo olukungaaba olw’ennaku essatu olukwata ku nkozesa y’ettaka. ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Okuwuliira ogw'okuwamba n'okutta omuwala Suzan Magara tekugenze mu maaso olwa abasibe okwemulugunyizza omulamuzi agulimu Alex Ajiiji Mackay nga enjala bwebaluma tebalidde kyagulo olwa kkooti okugwa ekikerezi olunaku lwa jjo era nti tebasuziddwa gyebalina kusula era bwatyo omulamuzi nagwongezaayo okutuusa olunaku lw'enkya. ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Baddereeva ba takisi abakolera ku luguudo lwa Northern Bypass bavudde mu mbeera nebeekandagga nga balumiriza abakulembeze baabwe abasusse okubaliisa akakanja. ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Abantu ab’enjawulo bongedde ebbugumu mu nteekateeka z’embaga ya Kyabazinga bwebawaddeyo ebintu.Aba Euro foam bawaddeyo ekitanda kwanasula so nga n’aba NUP bawaddeyo ensimbi obukadde 10. ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Abantu abaliko obulemu bw’obutalaba n’obutawulira balombozze enaku gyebayitamu n’okubeera mu bulabe bw’okukwatibwa akawuka aleeta mukenenya. Babadde ku Africana aba Uganda Aids commission gyebatongolezza eby’ogera ku mukenenya ebikyuusiddwa mu lulimi abaliko obulemu buno lwebategeera. /////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Enteekateeka z’okuzza obujja Enkalala zabalonzi ezekibiina Kya Nrm ziri mu gira, abakulira ebyokulonda mu disitulikiti basabidwa okuwandiisa abantu awata...

title: 'Tondeka e Kiwaatule' w'omulundi guno abooze n'ayitawo!
content:
Big Size munene munene, manya Bebe Cool yatuukirizza buli kye yasuubiza okuli abayimbi abanene ab’enjawulo okuyimba, obukuumi obw’amaanyi eri abantu nga bagenda n’okuddayo awaka, okuteerawo abaagala emipiira entimbe we basobola okulabira liigi ya Bungereza n’ebirala bingi.
Abadigize nga bawanise obutebe ng'omuziki gubayingidde.
Kyabadde kijjobi kyennyini mu kivvulu kya Tondeka e Kiwatule anti buli muntu obwedda agenda awali ebimusanyusa era abantu baabinuse okutuukira ddala ku ssaawa 8:00 ogw’ekiro nga nnyinimu Bebe Cool ye yakigadde..
Fik Fameica.
Eno waabaddeyo abayimbi bayitirivu okuli Chameleone, Eddie Kenzo, Paasita Bugembe, Levixone, Weasel, Azawi, Fik Fameica, Grenade, Mudra n’abalala nga be baasanyusizza abadigize.
Chameleone ng'ayimba e Kiwatule.
Bebe Cool yeebazizza abantu okugenda mu kivvulu n’ategezea nti ebintu byakwongera okutereera kubanga ate ne kumulundi gun o balabye eby’enjawulo bingi ate nga birungi gye bali.Pasiita Bugembe ng'ayimba.
Kenzo naye yabaddeyo.

title: Azimbidde nnyina ennyumba ya buwumbi n'awuniikiriza abantu!
content:
ABAYIMBI ne bakazannyirizi beefuze omukolo ogwakoleddwa Yasin Kachwere, nnannyini Success Motors, mu kuyingira ennyumba gye yazimbidde nnyina ebalirirwamu obuwumbi bwa ssente. Baabadde Kasanje.
Abayimbi abaabaddeyo kwabaddeko; Acidic Vokoz, Benti Boys, Shami and Shawa, eyazze ng’azannya nga Pulezidenti Museveni, Maurana ne Reign n’abalala.
Yasin Kachwere, yategeezezza nti nnyina yamubeererawo nnyo nga mu byonna by’amukoledde, abadde alina okugattako okumuzimbira ennyumba galikwoleka. Maama yeebazizza omutabani olw’ebirungi by’amukolera.

title: Munnakatemba Reign bakimukoze ku kabaga k'amazaalibwa ge!...
content:
KAZANNYIRIZI Reign ng'ono azannyira mu kibiina kya Maulana and Reign akiguddeko bw'abadde akuza amazaalibwa ge ag'emyaka gy'atayagadde kwogera.
Ono baamuleetedde keeki ey'okusala wabula ng'akambe tekayitamu ne yeebuuza ogubadde! Yagenze okugibikkula nga tebangako keeki! Baddidde essepiki ne bawundirako ''icing sugar” olwo ne bamuteeramu ejjinja! Byamusobedde n'akolimira abaakikoze.
Bano baabadde ku Sibyangu Hotel e Nateete nga basoose kumuyiira mazzi we kyasusse n'abasaba bamusonyiwe awo oluvannyuma mikwano gye gye baayise ne gituula wansi nga gisanyusibwa okuva mu bayimbi abenjawulo okwabadde; Big Eye, Victor Kamenyo, David Lutalo wamu n'abalala.
Omuko;lo gwetabiddwaako n'omubaka w'e Mityana Munisipaali, Francis Zaake, pulomoota Abtex Musinguzi n'abanene abalala mikwano gya Reign.
Abazze baatonedde 'birthday boy' ebirabo ne bamumalako ennaku y'okuyirwa amazzi n'okusala essepiki ng'alowooza keeki.

title: Minisita Muyingo akubirizza abatikkiddwa ku IUEA okubeera ab
content:
Minisita omubeezi ow’ebyenjigiriza ebyawaggulu John Crysestom Muyingo akuutidde abayizi ba International University of East Africa (IUEA) abatikkiddwa olwaleero okwongera obuyiiiya nga beyambisa amagezi agabawereddwa mu misomo gye bamaliriza kibasobozese obutakoowa kutambula nga banonya emirimu.
Agambye nti obuyiiya, obuvumu n’okutambulira ku ssayansi ne tekinologiya aleeteddwa mu nsi y’emu kungeri abayizi abasomeseddwa gye basobola okuwangulamu n’okuteka amagezi mu bye bayigiriziddwa.
Minisita Muyingo ng'ali ku matikkira
Okwogera bino, abadde ku matikkira ga IUEA e Kansanga mwebatikidde abayizi abasoba mu 600 abatikiddwa oluvanyuma lw’okumaliriza emisomo egyenjawulo mu mateeka, bizinensi, sayansi ne tekinologiya.
‘Nebaza abakulu abaddukanya yunivasite ya IUEA okuteeka amanyi mu buyiiya, okutondawo ebintu ebyenjawulo omuli n’okusomesa engeri gyewetandikirawo emirimu nga gano gemakubo agenjawulo abavubuka mwe basobola okuyita okwejja mu bwavu.
muyingo yayongedde nategeeza abayizi abatikiddwa nti gavumenti neetegefu okuyambako abavubuka ku mitendera egyenjawulo n’okuvujjirira abamalirizza emisomo gyabwe abalina ebirowoozo ebisobola okukyuusa eggwanga.
Gano gabadde amatikkira ga IUEA aga 12 bukyanga yunivasite eno etandikibwawo, mu bayizi abatikiddwa mwabaddemu n’Omubaka wa Lubaga South,Mukasa Aloysious eyafunye diguli mu by’amateeka.
Amyuuka cansala ya yunivasite Emeka Akaezuwa akubirizza abayizi okukozesa ebibasomeseddwa okunonyereza n’obuyiiya kibasobozese okwetandikirawo emirimu egyabwe n’okubako kye beyongerako .
Abamu ku batikkiddwa
Yategezezza nti ensomesa yabayizi ensangi zino etambulira ku buyiiya obwenjawulo n’okweyambisa tekinologiya owenjawulo okubeerako bye batandikawo kibayambe okuvuganya ku katale k’emirimu.
Mu bayizi abatikiddwa mwabaddemu abasukkulumye ku bannabwe nga balina obuyiiya bwe batandisewo omuli engeri y’okuterekamu ebintu eby’omulembe ebikolebwa obutononeka, obuyiiya bw’ebyuuma ebisima eby’obugagga okuva mu ttaka, n’ekyuuma kya sayansi ekisobola okuyamba okuwa omuntu obujjanjabi nga tali kumpi n’eddwaliro.
Cosmas Mwikirize omusomesa ku yunivasite ya IUEA ategezezza nti abayizi abatikiddwa balina okukozesa byebafunye mu yunivasite okusobola okukyusa obulamu bwabwe wabula ssi kutuula na diguli zabwe mu mayumba.
ayongedde nabakubiriza obutatya kugezako n’okulemererwa kubanga lino ly’erimu ku makubo agayitibwamu okuleeta enkyukakyuka mu buli kintu ekikolebwa.

title: Minisita Chris Baryomunsi ayanjulidde abatikkiddwa ku ISBAT
content:
MINISITA wa tekinologiya n’okuteekerateekera eggwanga Dr. Chris Balyomunsi, ayanjulidde bannayuganda ettu gavumenti lyereeta, okuteerawo abayizi abamalirizza emisomo ssente okwekulaakulanya.
Abyogeredde ku woteeri Africana, ku matikkira g’e 18 aga yunivasite ya ISBAT, abasobye mu 700 bwebafunye diguli esooka, ey’okubiri, Diploma n’amabaluwa mu masomo ag’enjawulo okuli; Bizinensi, ICT, Engineering, Public Health n’ebirala.
Abayizi abaatikkiddwa diguli eyookubiri mu bizinensi MBA
Balyomunsi agambye nti mu kisanja ekijja NRM ng’ewangudde, pulezidenti Museveni yayanjudde okuteekawo ensawo ya “Graduate fund” okuyambako abayizi abamalirizza emisomo nga tebanafuna mirimu, basobole okutandikawo egyabwe, naabasaba okuyiira pulezidenti Museveni obululu awangulire waggulu atuukirize ebiyamba eggwanga.
Asabye ababaka ba paalamenti okwongera ku buyigirize bwabwe, nti kubanga bangi abali mu paalamenti obuyigirize butono olw’etteeka eririwo nti , kasita omala siniya ey’omukaaga weesimbawo, kyagambye nti kikonzibya entambula y’emirimu kuba bingi ebibabulamu.
Asabye abatikkiddwa okubeera ba ambasada ba ISBAT nga bakola bulungi emirimu n’obuvunaanyizibwa, batumbule ekifaananyi n’erinnya lya ISBAT ebabangudde. Neyeebaza ISBAT olw’okutumbula saayansi ne tekinologiya, nti kubanga kati atunuuliddwa nyo okutwala eggwanga mumaaso.
Asiimye ISBAT olw’okusitula ekifaananyi ky’eggwanga wano n’ebweru olw’omutindo gwereese mu tekinologiya. Neyeebaza pulezidenti Museveni eyaleeta emirembe n’akkiriza abantu ssekinoomu omuli n’abagwira okutandikawo univasite, kuba bweyajjira mu buyinza nga waliwo emu yokka eya Makerere, ng’abantu bangi balemererwa okwegatta ku univasite, naye kati ziriwo 68.
Abamu ku batikkiddwa
Chansala wa Univasite eno Fred Jachan Omach Mandir ategeezezza nti, ISBAT eteeka nyo essira ku bya tekinologiya ne saayansi ekigifudde ey’enjawulo era namba emu wano mu Uganda ne East Africa, ate nebeera emu ku ezo 10 ezisinga mu Africa. Neyeebaza pulezidenti Museveni olw’okuleeta emirembe egisobozesa bingi okutumbuka.
Ssenkulu w’ekitongole kyeby’empuliziganya mu ggwanga ekya UCC, George William Nyombi Tembo, agambye nti balina enkolagana ey’enjawulo UCC ne ISBAT okutumbula Tekinologiya kubanga takyewalika mu bulamu bwa bantu obwa bulijjo, naawa ekyokulabirako nti kati omuntu asobola okusoma ekitabo mu ddakiika 25 naakimalako ng’akozesa tekinologiya, sso nga luli kyatwalanga ebbanga, neyeebaza ISBAT okutumbula tekinologiya mu bannayuganda.
Ssentebe w’olukiiko olutandisi lwa ISBAT (board of directors) Varghese Mundamattam agambye nti, baasalawo okukulembeza tekinologiya ne saayansi kubanga yeetoloolera kumpi mu buli kintu, nti wabula balina okusomoozebwa olw’ebikozesebwa mu tekinologiya okuba eby’obuseere ate nga tebiriiwo mu ggwanga, biva bweru ate nebibinikibwa omusolo mungi, naasaba gavumenti okubaako engeri gyebakwatizaako okukendeeza.
Abayizi abawadde entanda ng’abawa enjogera yeeyali pulezidenti wa South Africa Nelson Mandela eyagamba nti; “omuwanguzi ye muntu aloot...

title: Omuyimbi Chameleone amenye bye yateeka mu kiraamo kye!
content:
OMUYIMBI Jose Chameleone, yeekyusizza ng’era, erinnya bw’eriri, n’amenya bye yateeka mu kiraamo kye.

Mu kukungubagira omugenzi Mowzey Radio, yategeeza nga bw’atalitegeka kivvulu mu kisaawe Kololo.

Yategeeza abakungubazi nga naye bwe balina okumutwalawo ng’afudde era ekifo k’akitereke, abakungubazi abaligendawo mu kaseera ako.

Kyokka ate yeekyusizza, n’ategekerawo ekivvulu nga September 8 n’akakasa nti ddala nawolovu (Chameleone), akyusa langi. Ne Fik Fameica, alinayo ekivvulu nga Spetember 8.

title: Poliisi yeeweze okuffeffetta abazzi b'emisango omwaka guno
content:
POLIISI yeeweze okufeffetta abazzi b'emisango mu buli kanyomero, okulaba ng'obumenyi bw'amateeka , bukendeerera ddala.

Mu kikwekweto ekikoleddwa mu kiro ekikeesezza leero, mu zzooni ya Kevina e Nsambya e Kabalagala, Kakuuta e Namataba Mukono, Kyebando okumpi ne Premax Hotel , Kisalosalo e Kyebando, Nkurama rd ne Ntebe traffic lights mu Kampala, wamu ne ku bitaala bya Luzira - portbell Rd, bayodde 39.

Mu bye baabasanze nabyo, mulimu enjaga ey’obusigo, ey'obukoola , ebigambibwa okuba ebibbe , obusawo n'amasimu n'ebirala.

Amyuka omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala, Luke Owoyesigyire, agambye nti, bakyafeffetta abalala.

title: Ebijaguzo eby’emyaka 40 egya New Vision
content:
ABANYUMIRWA omuziki, baafulumye ekisaawe e Kololo ku Lwokutaano nga banyumiddwa bya nsusso!
bantu nga banyumirwa endongo ya Bamakoma.
Baabadde mu bijaguzo bya New Vision eby’okuweza emyaka 40 mu buweereza. Bandi ya Makoma erimu abayimbi enzaalwa y’e Congo, ye yakulembeddemu okusanyusa abantu era yalinnye ku siteegi ku ssaawa 4:30 n’ekuba kayimba ku kayimba ng’abantu bwe banyumirwa wakati mu byambalo ebyakaayakana bakira bye bakyusa.
Natalie Makoma, omu ku bayimbi abali mu bandi ya Makoma ng’ayimbira abantu.
Don Wanyama, akulira Vision Group yeebazizza abantu abaajagulizzaako New Vision. Era yeebazizza abawagidde ekivvulu kino okuli; Pacific Events, NBS TV, Pepsi, MTN, Sky’s Hotel Naguru, Safe Boda, Sumz n’abalala. Bamakoma baawerekeddwako abayimbi okwabadde Pasita Bugembe, Recheal K, Pasita Brian Lubega n’abalala.

title: Abakulira eby'ebulambuzi mu ggwanga batudde okutema empenda
content:
ABADUKANYA ebitongole ebyobulambuzi mu ggwanga batudde mul usirika e Jinja okusobola okwekubamu ttooci ku biki bye bakoze okusobola okukulaakulanya ebyobulambuzi mu ggwanga na biki byebayinza okwongera obikulakulanya nga olukung'aana luno lumaze ennaku 3 ku wooteli ya gavumenti amanyiddwa nga Crested Crane Hotel.

Akulira Uganda Wild Life Authority Dr James Musinguzi ategeezeeza nti basanyufu nnyo okuba nga baasobola okuzzaayo Enkula 4 mu kkuumiro lya Ajai erisangibwa mu Madi-Okolo West Nile, ekintu ekyasanyusa ennyo abatuuze era mukiseera kino batandiise okufuna abalambuzi ate basuubira okutwaala endala mu makumiro okuli Kidepo ne Murchison Falls National Park.

Abakungu okuva mu Kitongole kye byobulambuzi nga batuude mulukungana okwekubamu tooki e Jinja

Asembyeyo nga agamba nti bakuzimba zoo ezenjawulo nga esoose esangibwa Mbale endala ezigenda okuzimbibwa kuliiko Gulu, Mbarara wamu ne Kyenjojo okusobola okusikiriza abantu okwagala eby'obulambuzi kiyambe eggwanga okufuna ensimbi.

Ono agambye nti mu kiseera kino betanide nnyo tekinologiya era Kati abantu basobola okusasula ensimbi nga bayita ku simu kwossa nokulondoola ebisolo nga bakozesa tekinologiya nebintu ebirala bingi.

Minister we byobulambuzi Hon Tom Butime ategeezeeza nti mu manifesto ya NRM 2021-2025 , gavumenti yakusuumusa Katonga, Tooro-Semiliki okufulibwa amakuumiro ge bisolo agajjudde kwosa ne Echuya, Kyambura, Kigezi okufulibwa amakuumiro ge bisolo oluvanyuma lwa cabinet okuyisa enteekateeka eno okugenda mumaaso, nga kati kirindiddwa palamenti okukakasibwa.

Doreen Katusiime Omuwandiise wenkalakalira mu Kitongole kye byobulambuzi e Jinja

Ono agambye nti baakukakasa nti Bugoma ne Pian-Upe nago gafuulibwa amakuumiro g'ebisolo agajjudde, ky'agambye nti kirungi nnyo kubanga kyakuyamba okukulakulanya eby'obulambuzi mu gwanga.

Asembyeyo nga agamba nti waliwo enkulakuna etukidwaako mukitongole kye by'obulambuzi okuli okuzimba wooteli emanyiddwa nga Crested Crane Hotel, okuzaayo enkula mukuumiro lya Ajai elisangibwa mu Madi-Okolo, West Nile .

Ono avumiridde abantu abonoona erinya lya lyenyonyi y'egwanga Uganda Airlines kyagamba nti kikolwa kikyamu nnyo .

title: Mmengo ewadde ensaasaanya y’Oluwalo lw’omwaka 2025
content:
MMENGO ewadde ensaasaanya y’ensimbi 1,953,545,400/- ezaakung’aanyizibwa mu nkola y’Oluwalo mu mwaka gwa 2025.

Omumyuka owookubiri owa Katikkiro era omuwanika wa Buganda, Robert Waggwa Nsibirwa ye yawadde ensaasaanya eno n’agamba nti baayagadde kwoleka abantu obukulu bw’obwerufu mu nkulaakulana.

Obukadde 319, zaakozesebwa okutandika amasomero ga nnasale 12; Bulemeezi, Kyaddondo, Buddu, Busujju, Ssingo, Gomba, Buvuma, Kabula, Busiro, Kyaggwe, Bugerere ne Kooki. Omulimu gw’Amasiro g’e Kasubi ogwalangirirwa nti gumaliriziddwa gwatwalako 471,244,341/-

Ensimbi 196,151,534/- zaakozesebwa kugula ebikozesebwa n’okutandika, okuddukanya eddwaaliro lya Muteesa II e Busimbi - Mityana mu Ssingo ate 37,118,000/- zaakoze ku pulogulaamu ey'okuwagira abalimi, okufuna emisomo ku nnima ey’omulembe ate nga ya mutindo.

Kabaka Education Fund (KEF) nga kye kitongole kya Kabaka ekiweerera abaana kyawagiddwa n’ensimbi 55,583,650/- eziyambye abaana ba Buganda okusoma.

Ensimbi 88,810,000/- zaakozesebwa okuteekateeka emikolo gya Luwalo lwaffe omuli ebirabo, weema, obutebe, okutimba, endongo, ebyobuyonjo, ebyokwerinda, abasitula ebintu, n’okulambuza abakiise Embuga.

Okukola ku nzirukanya y’emirimu mu masaza, 48,649,088/- ze zaaddiziddwaayo okuyamba ku ntambuza y’emirimu. Ku nsimbi eziva mu ggombolola, ebitundu 10 ku 100 ziddizibwayo okukola emirimu egitali gimu noolwekyo mu nteekateeka eno 195,354,540/- ze zaatuukirizza obuvunaanyizibwa obwo.

Okusembeza abantu abaleeta oluwalo e Bulange mu mbeera y’emmere n’amazzi kwateekebwamu 142,010,000/-. Okukubisa satifikeeti, ebbaasa omusabikibwa satifikeeti, ne fuleemu z’ebifaananyi byamalawo 262,007,395/-.

Okuwagira enteekateeka z’okuzimba ekisaawe ky’essaza ly’e Buddu mu mukago Obwakabaka gwe bulina n’ekitongole kya EACOP, zaateekebwamu ensimbi 94,000,000/- ate enteekateeka z’ebyobulamu omuli okukuba ensiisira z’ebyobulamu zaateekebwamu 43,211,852/- ng’abantu 42,202 be baafuna obujjanjabi

title: Abwa Kabaka bwa Buganda bagemye abantu Corona
content:
Bya DICKSON KULUMBA

OBWAKABAKA bwa Buganda bugemye abantu obulwadde bwa Ssenyiga Kkolona ng'Obuganda bwetegekera okukuza olunaku lwa Bulungibwansi ne gavumenti ez'ebitundu olunaku lw'enkya ng'emikolo emikulu gyakubeera mu Lubiri e Mmengo.

No 2(7)

Omumyuka asooka owa Katikkiro wa Buganda Polof Kaawaase Kigongo asinzidde ku mukolo guno ogubadde e Bulange Mmengo enkya ya Leero n'ategeeza abantu nti abatayagala kugemwa,balabe ba banaabwe.

No 8(2)

Abantu ab'enjawulo boogedde ku nteekateeka eno ey'okugema ekoleddwa olunaku lwa Leero nga yenyigiddwamu n'eddwaliro ly'e Mengo.

Ate Olubiri lwa Kabaka e Mmengo awagenda okubeera emikolo gya Bulungibwansi luli mu kuyoyootebwa abantu ab'enjawulo abali mu bibiina nga Seven Hills ne Baganda Nkerettanyi nga nabo boogedde ku Bulungibwansi Ono gwebetabyemu.

title: Bye wasubiddwa e Kololo mu misinde gy'abannalotale mu bifaananyi 5!
content:
Bannalotale n'abantu abawerera ddala emitwalo 6 be beetabye mu misinde gy'okulwanyisa obulwadde bwa kookolo eggulo ku ssande.

Whatsapp Image 2025 08 31 At 8.04.34 Am (1)

Ekigendererwa ky'emisinde gino, kwe kufuna ssente z'okumaliriza okuzimba ekizimbe kya Cancer Centre ku ddwaaliro e Nsambya mu Kampala n'okukissaamu ebyuma eby’omulembe n'ebikozesebwa ebirala ebinaayamba ku bujjanjabi buno.

Amyuka gavana wa bbanka enkulu eya Uganda, Polof Nuwagaba naye yabaddeyo.

Bw'abadde ayogerako eri abeetabye mu misinde gino ku kisaawe e Kololo, eyaliko disitulikiti gavana Steven Mwanje, agambye nti mu 2023 baasonda akawumbi kamu. Ayongeddeko nti mu 2024 ne basonda obuwumbi 2 n’obukadde 100 nga ku luno bafunye obuwumbi 3 n’ekitundu.

Annyonnyodde nti baagala mu 2027 ekifo kino, kibeere nga kikozesebwa. Ate ye Rotary International director nominee Emanuel Katongole, agambye nti emisinde gino, gigendererwamu okutaasa abo abalina obulwadde bwa kookolo era omulimu gwatandika emyaka nga mwenda egiyise.

Abaana abato nabo baabaddeyo

Ayongeddeko nti Bannayuganda bafa olw'obulwadde buno nga newankubadde bajjanjabibwa.

Agasseeko nti batandise okutendeka abasawo abagenda okukozesa ebyuma ebinassibwa mu kizimbe kino mu ddwaaliro e Nsambya, asabye abo bonna abasobola okuwaayo okugenda mu maaso n'okubadduukirira.

title: Chamilli akikubira ku leediyo y'e Burundi
content:
JOSE Chameleone acamudde abawagizi be bw’alaze leediyo gy'akolako e Burundi.
Ono aliko akatambi ke yatadde ku mikutu gye egy’enjawulo akalaga leediyo eyo eyitibwa Chameleone Fm ng’eno esangibwa mu kibuga kya Burundi ekikulu
ekiyitibwa Bujumbura.
Bwe twatuukiridde omu ku bamuli okumpi yategeezezza Bukedde nti Chamili leediyo eno yamukoleddwa Pulezidenti wa Burundi, Evarist Ndayishimiye gwe yasisinkana gye buvudeko.
Yatutegeezeza nti Chamili bwe yamusisinkana yamubuuza engeri gye basobola okuyambamu okutumbula ekisaawe ky’okuyimba mu Burundi nga wano we yasinziira okumusuubiza okumuyambako.

title: Ekibabu mu Iran;Yisirayi ekubye ddipo z’amafuta;Amerika ereese ennyonyi ez’omutawaana 2
content:
AMERICA ereese mu ddwaaniro ennyonyi endala bbiri kabikabi, ng’emu etikka bbomu ezizitowa kiro 31,000, endala amaanyi gaayo ne ssaayansi, oyinza okugayita aga nnamuzisa.

Ennyonyi ezo okutuuka, nga Yisirayiri erimu ku mawanga agali mu lutalo lwa Iran, eyokezza amafuta g’eggwanga eryo ne gatuntumuka abaawawamuse mu kiro nga gaaka, ne balowooza nti obudde bwabadde bukedde olw’ekitangaala ky’omuliro eky’amaanyi.

Abatuuze mu kibuga Tehran ekya Iran, baakutte obutambi obwewuunyisa obulaga ennimi z’omuliro ezaasaasaanidde mu mpewo ng’omuliro gutambula.

Amafuta agaakubiddwa gaasaasaanidde n’emidumu gya kazambi.

Olwo eggye lya Yisirayiri lyabadde likubye emu ku dipo z’amafuta ga Iran ku Lwomukaaga mu mbeera eyatabudde abantu era enkuba bwe yatonnye mu muliro ogwo, yabadde ekka wansi ng’erimu omunyale olw’ebintu ebyabadde ng’ebisiriiza by’amafuta ebyabadde bikwatiridde mu bwengula.

ENNYONYI B-52 BOMBER

Ennyonyi ekika kya B-52 Strato fortresses long range heavy strategic bombers, zaatuuse dda mu ddwaaniro era ze zimu ku zongedde amaanyi mu lutalo.

Zino tezikuba nga ziva kumpi, era ezimu zaalabiddwaako nga zituuka mu Bungereza we zigenda okuvanga okukuba kyokka endala ziva butereevu ku kitebe kyazo ekya Barksdale Air Force Base mu ssaza lya Louisiana mu America.

Endala ziva mu nkambi ya Air Force Base mu ssaza lya North Dakota awali ekitebe ekikubi kya bbomu ekya 5th Bomb Wing.

Ekitebe kya Barksdale ky’ekikola ng’ekitebe ky’ennyonyi zonna ezikuba nga zisinziira wala oba ezikuba wonna mu nsi, kiyite ‘Air Force Global Strike Command (AFGSC).’

Okutolontoka okuva mu America okutuuka mu ddwaaniro, zaawerekeddwaako ennyonyi ennwaanyi entonotono okwekuuma omulabe.

B-52 nazo zisobola okwetooloola ensi nga teziyimiridde kwongerwamu mafuta kuba, waliwo ennyonyi endala ezigongeramu nga tezissa wansi.

Zitolontoka olugendo lwa mayiro 4,151 okumala essaawa munaana n’ekitundu nga teziyimiridde ne ziruddamu nga zimaze okukuba tageti okudda gye zaavudde.

ENTALO MWE ZIZZE ZIRWANA

1. Olwa Iran mwe zitandise okukola mu kikwekweto Operation Epic Furry

2. Operation Iraqi Freedom mu 2003 olwaggyako Saddam Hussein eyali owa Iraq.

3. Mu 1991 olutalo lwa Persian Gulf War, zaasimbulanga Diego Garcia mu liyanja lya Buyindi ne mu Amerika okulwana mu Iraq (olwa Iraq olwasooka).

4. Mu lutalo lw’e Bosnian, olwe Kosovo n’olwa Afghanistan mu 2001, zaasimbulanga mu bitundu bye bimu waggulu.

5. Olwa Vietnam

EBIKWATA KU NNYONYI ZINO

Omukutu gwa Wikipediagulaga bino;

l Emu yeetikka omugatte gwa buzito bwa kkiro 37,500. Olw’okuba nneetissi za bbomu, obuzito obwo ze bbomu z’esobola okutikka.

l Ebiwaawaatiro biwanvu mita 56 ekitegeeza byagala kwenkana kisaawe kya mupiira ekya mita 100.

l Edduka sipiidi ya 1,046 km/h

l Ennyonyi ekika kya KC-135 Stratotanker yeeyongera amafuta mu B-52.

l Ebeeramu abagoba bataano ng’abana bakafulu mu kugivuga ate omu kafulu mu kukuba bbomu.

l Zikolebwa kkampuni ya America ekola ennyonyi eya Boeing mu 1948 nga ssematalo owookubiri yaakaggwa mu...

title: Abagambibwa okwekalakaasa mu kiseera ky'okulangirira akalulu basindikiddwa mu kkomera
content:
ABANTU abasoba mu 100 ng'okusingira ddala bavubuka basindikiddwa mu kkomera ku bigambibwa nti beenyigira mu kwekalakaasa oluvannyuma lw’okulonda.

Bano baaleeteddwa kuva ku poliisi e Katwe ne basimbibwa mu kkooti y’eddaala erisooka e Makindye.

Abawawaabirwa kuliko Fred Kalyango,Ivan Kiggundu, James Mukiibi,Bruce Mwesigwa,Ponsiano Ngondwe,Edgar Muntu,Ashraf Ssegane,Julius Bukenya,Micky Mutyobola, Edwin Musimenta ne Madina Kisaasi.

Mu balala mulimu Musa Mubiru, Faisal Shafik,Micheal Lubwama,Musa Kabogere, Godfrey Katongole, Sam Kiyemba, Twaha Ssekimpi, Nyombi,Abel Mawejje, Alex Ssemakula,Elvis Zebron ,Mark Mulunba,Joshua Kayiwa,Mujaasi David n'abalala.

Bano baakwatibwa nga January 16 ate abalala nga 17, 2026 mu bitundu by’e Kibuye ne Salaama Road nga bazibye oluguudo ssaako okwokya ebipiira.

Abalala baagambibwa okusangibwa e ggangu ku luguudo lw’e Busabala nga basazeeko oluguudo bookya bipiira mu ngeri etaataaganya ebyentambula n’abakozesa oluguudo abalala.

Omulamuzi David Magala abasomedde emisango era bonna ne bagyegaana n’abasindika mu kkomera.

Omuwaabi wa gavunenti ategeezezza nti okunoonyereza kuwedde na bwe kityo kkooti n’ebawa olwa February 10, 2026 okuwulira obujulizi.

title: Aba Volleyball bayungudde abazannyi 20 okwetegekera eza Zone
content:
EKIBIINA ekifuga omuzannyo gwa Volleyball mu ggwanga kizzeemu okuzza obuggya endagaano y’omutendesi wa ttiimu y’abakazi Tony Peter Lakony wakati nga beetegekera ez’okusunsulamu amawanga ga Zone V aganeetaba mu mizannyo gya Afrika (All African Games qualifiers).
Lakony abadde omutendesi wa ‘Lady Volleyball Cranes’ okuva 2007 wabula mu 2015 yasuulawo ttawulo okumala emyaka ebiri, omulimu ne guweebwa Johnson Kawenyera okutuusa sizoni ya 2018.
2019 Lakony yakomawo nga kati endagaano ebadde eweddeko wabula Pulezidenti Sadik Nasiwu ne UVF ekibiina ekifuga omuzannyo ne basalwo okugizza obuggya.
Ono oluvannyuma lw’okuzza obuggya endagaano yayungudde ttiimu y’abazannyi 20 ng’ayambibwako omumyuka Bart Munting ne Mariam Nakamya okutandika okutendekebwa nga beetegekera eza Zone V ez’okuzannyibwa mu June w’omwaka guno nga Uganda y’erina enkizo okuzikyaza.
Ttiimu yatandikiddewo okutendekebwa ku African Bible University e Lubowa nga balindirira okubbinkana n’amawanga 12 aga Zone V okuli; Kenya, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi, South Sudan, Sudan, Ethiopia, Misiri, Eritrea, Somalia, Djibout ne Uganda.
Ssinga akalulu kakwata Uganda okutegeka eza Zone V zino, gujja kubeera mulundi gwakubiri okuva mu 2014 lwe basookera ddala wabula baakubwa Kenya ku fayinolo ne basubwa okukiika. Eza Afrika ez’omulundi guno zaakubeera mu kibuga Accra ekya Ghana mu August w’omwaka guno.
“Omulundi guno tutandise okutendekebwa nga bukyali kuba ttiimu nnyingi ze tugenda okubbinkana nazo, twetaaga okukola ennyo olw’okuvuganya okugenda okuba okungi,” Lakony bwe yategeezezza.
Abazannyi abayitiddwa.
Joan Tushemereirwe, Ketty Aluka, Eunice Amuron, Supernatural Mbakusiimira ne Margaret Namyalo (aba KCCA), Moreen Mwamula, Agnes Akanyo, Oliver Acan ne Hadijah Otin (aba OBB), Comfort Twesiime, Doreen Akiteng, Diana Asiimwe ne Patricia Musubika (aba Sport-s), Catherine Ainembabazi (Ndejje Elites), Monica Aloyo, Habibah Namala ne Jennifer Alungat(KCB Nkumba), Scholar Akello (VVC), Mouricia Nabuma (KAVC), Evas Nayebare (UCU)

title: Poliisi ezudde pikipiki 6 ezigambibwa okukozesebwa ababbi ok
content:
PIKIPIKI 6 ezigambibwa okuba ng'ababbi baludde nga bazeeyambisa okutigomya abantu mu Kampala, Mukono ne Wakiso, zizuuliddwa mu kikwekweto ekikoleddwa mu kiro ekikeesezza leero.
Mu kikwekweto kino ekikoleddwa e Mukono , Mbalwa, Namugongo,Salaama rd Kisangaani, Mukwano n'ebitundu ebirala, era bayodde 90 ne babaggalira.
Pikipiki zino ezisuubirwa okuba enzibe n'ezimu tekuli nnamba ate ng'endala, bazivuga ennamba bagibibinazza n'abalala okuzikyusakyusa, bazikwatidde Mukono n'abantu 9.
Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala , Recheal Kawala, agambye nti ebikwekweto ebirala, bikoleddwa e Ntebe Nakawuka nga bafunyeyo 14, ku lw'e Salaama bakutteyo 64.

title: Pulaani ya America okukuba Iran ewedde
content:
AKASATTIRO kagudde mu Iran, bw’etegedde nti ppulaani ya America okugikuba, okukwata oba okutta Ayatollah ewedde.

Okumala eggobe mu kibya, n’emmeeri eyayoola Nicolas Maduro owa Venezuela etuuse mu Iran, nga kati enteekateeka yonna erinze biragiro bya Trump olutalo lukwajje.

Akasattiro kaddiridde akakiiko ka America akakola ku byokwerinda aka, National Security okumaliriza omulimu gwako ku by’okutegeka olutalo okuwamba oba okutta omukambwe wa Iran, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, eyalemera ku by’okuweesa bbomu za nukiriya ne mizayiro ekika kya Ballistic ez’amaanyi.

Amawulire ga CBS News America, gaategeezezza nti, ppulaani yaweereddwa Pulezidenti w’eggwanga eryo, Donald Trump, mu bujjuvu n’agisiima. Ensonda zigamba nti, Trump kati y’abulayo yekka okuduumira eggye litandike omulimu ekyayongedde akasattiro mu kibuga Tehran ekya Iran nti, olutalo luyinza n’okutandika ku wiikendi eno.

Bino we bijjidde ng’enteeseganya wakati w’amawanga gombi zazzeemu mu kibuga Geneva ekya Switzerland ng’aba Oman be baziri mu mitambo. Minisita wa Iran ow’ensonga ez’ebweru, Abbas Araghchi yagambye nti, balina bye bakkaanyizzaako balinze kubiteekako mikono.

Kyokka JD Vance nga y’amyuka Trump yagambye nti, wadde balina bye baatuuseeko, ebisinga obukulu Iran ekyagaanye okubikkiriza. Ebimu ku Iran bye yagaana edda, kwe kukkiriza okusaanyaawo ebikwatagana n’enteekateeka zaayo ku by’amaanyi ga nukiriya ne mizayiro ez’amaanyi.

America erumiriza Iran bw’eri mu nteekateeka z’okuweesa bbomu za nukiriya kyokka yo egamba nti nukiyira waayo emukozesa ku bya kunoonyereza ku by’amasannyalaze, bujjanjabi n’ebya ssaayansi omulala. America ne banywanyi baayo bagamba nti ensi nga Iran tebayinza kugikkiriza kubeera na byakulwanyisa binnamuzisa kubanga kyangu nnyo okubikozesa obubi engeri gy’erina ebyafaayo ebigigatta ku butujju mu nsi yonna.

PPULAANI EGENDA OKUKOLA KU IRAN NE AYATOLLAH

Wadde tekinnamanyika ngeri ki America gy’egenda kulumba Iran, ebimu ku bimanyiddwa bye bino;

l Nti tegenda kusindikayo magye ga ku ttaka ssaawa eno.

l Abakambwe 10 nga bakulembeddwaamu Ayatollah, balina okukolwako, okutwalibwa nga balamu oba nga bamaze egyabwe.

l Enkambi ez’amaanyi mu by’ekijaasi zigenda kusesebbulwa.

l Fakitole za nukiriya zigenda kukubwa zirekebwe ku ttaka.

l Ebikwatagana n’empuku eziri wansi mu ttaka n’emikwesese, bigenda kukubwa bisaanyizibwewo gye byakukulirwa n’abaliyo.

EMMEERI EYAKUBA MADURO ETUUSE

Okumanya olutalo lwengedde, n’emmeeri luvookwaya, USS Gerald R. Ford, eyabadde mu liyanja lya Caribbean era nga ye yakozesebwa mu by’okuyoola Maduro, nayo yatuuse mu kyondo kya Buwalabu okukola ku Iran.

Ng’oggyeeko okukuba Iran, egenda kukozesebwa nnyo okutaasa Yisirayiri ssinga Iran eneebeera egikuba mu kwesasuza ng’olutalo lutandise. Egenda kwongera okukuba bamasinale ba Iran abagiwagira okuli aba Houthi mu Yemen, Hezibollah mu Lebanon, Hamas mu Gaza, Katab Hezibollah mu Iraq n’abalala bonna abasuubirwa okusitula omutwe ng’olutalo lutandise. USS Gerald Ford eriko abajaasi abatendeke...

title: Omwogezi w’abayeekera ba M23 e Congo attiddwa
content:
OMWOGEZI w’abayeekera ba M23 mu DR Congo, attiddwa ennyonyi za drone ezeevuga zokka banne ne bannyogoga.
Gen. Willy Ngoma abadde ayogerera abayeekera abo abawagirwa Rwanda, yattiddwa okusinziira ku ggye ly’ekibiina ky’amawanga amagatte ekikuuma emirembe mu DR Congo.
Amawulire ga AP gaategeezezza nti, abayeekera bano baabadde bawummuddemu ekiro ku ssaawa mwenda mu kiro ekyakeesezza Olwokubiri lwa wiiki eno, drone ne zikuba enkambi mwe baabadde mu kabuga Rubaya mu ssaza lya North Kivu.
Abayeekera ba M23 bakyali mu nteeseganya ezikomya olutalo olwo ne Gavumenti ya DR Congo ekulemberwa Felix Tshisekedi, kyokka omwaka oguwedde baawambye ebibuga ebinene mu buvanjuba bw’eggwanga eryo okuli Goma, Bukavu ne Uvira.
Okulwana okw’amaanyi ng’amagye ga DR Congo gafunye ennyonyi ezo ze yaguze e China, kwabayambye okweddiza Uvira ne gaddamu n’okuggulawo ensalo y’eggwanga eryo ne Burundi ekibuga ekyo we kisangibwa

title: Abayizi bana basimattuse akabenje
content:
ABAYIZI bana ab'essommero lya St. Peter's Naalya baddusiddwa mu ddwaliro okufuna obujjanjabi oluvannyuma lwa mmotoka mwe baabadde okutomeragana bwenyi ku bwenyi ne loole.

Christabella Awori, Claudia Namukasa, Margaret Atwone ne Prudence Tumugabirwe be bapooca n'ebisago.

Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Savanna ASP Sam Twineamazima ayaegeezezza nti akabenje kaagudde ku kyalo Kakindu mu ggombolola y'e Wabinyonyi mu Nakasongola ku luguudo oluva e Kampala okudda e Gulu ku Sande ku makya.

Kyaddiridde mmotoka ekika kya Fusion UBQ 935Y eyabadde eva e Kampala okudda e Gulu okugezaako okuyita loole y'amafuta n'eyambalagana ne costa UBK 257F ekika kya ambyulensi eyabadde eva e Gulu okudda e Kampala omwabadde abayizi.

Twineamazima yagambye nti akabenje kaavudde ku yabadde ayisa okuvuga endiima n'alaajanira abavuga ebidduka kunguudo zinmwasanjala okubeera abeegendereza nga bayisa n'okugondera amateeka g'okunguudo omuli okusoma obupande.

Ebidduka ebyakoze akabenje byatwaliddwa ku poliisi e Katuugo okwekebejjebwa ng'okunoonyereza bwe kugenda mu maaso.

title: Engeri enkuba y'eggulo gye yagootaanyizza emirimu gya Bannak
content:
ENKUBA eyatonnye ku Lwokubiri yasannyalaza emirimu gya Bannakampala n’ebitundu eby’enjawulo ebiriraanye ekibuga olw’amazzi agaabadde amanji ennyo agaayanjadde mu makubo ne mu bizimbe!
Omwana ku lugwanyu lwa payipu nga yeetegereza ebiveera ebitwalibwa amazzi.
Ku container Village amazzi gaayanjaalidde mu luguudo nga bannannyini maduuka basigadde munda nga bwe balinda gakendeere balyoke bafulume.
Amazzi nga gaagala okutwala mmotoka ya buyonjo mu kibuga.
Ku kizimbe kya Qualicel amazzi gaayingidde mu maduuka ga basuubuzi era obwedda bakutte baketi nga bagasena ng’eno bwe bagayiwa wabweru.
Amazzi nga gasaze ku container village.
Ku mwala gw’e Nakivubo abaana abanoonya sikulaapu baagumbye ku midumu egitambuza amazzi nga bwe bakebera ebiveera ebyabadde bitwalibwa amazzi okwekenneenya ebigalimu.
Tukutuku ng'egezaako okuwagaanya eyite mu mazzi.

title: Nnali nkooye obusambattuko mu maka gange kwe kuddukira mu Am
content:
Daniella Atim Mayanja, mukyala w’omuyimbi Jose Chameleon akawang’amudde bw’avuddeyo n’ategeeza ensi nga bwe giweze emyaka 5 bukya yaddukira mu Amerika okunoonya obubudamu obwalimu n’okudduka ekibambulira ky’okumutulugunya, kye yagumira okumala emyaka 16!
Chameleon Ne Daniella Lwe Baakuba Ebirayiro Byabwe.
“Nze maama nze taata ku baana bange 5 be nkuza kati obw'omu”, Atim bwe yayongeddeko. Kino kyayongedde okukakasa nti ababiri bano bandiba nga baayawukana kubanga omuntu akyali omufumbo tayinza kuvaayo n'ayogera bw'atyo!.
Yategeezezza nti newankubadde ng’emyaka gy’awezezza giringa emingi oba egimuwuubira akatambaala, , asazeewo azze buggya obulamu bw’ekivubuka nga bw’awona n’ebirowoozo.
Bino byonna Atim yabyogeredde ku mukutu gwe ogwa Instagram gye yatadde obubaka obwo!
Obubaka obw’ekika kino Daniella bwe yawandiise bukutte ku bantu abawerako naddala ku mukutu ogwa X (eyali Twitter) ne basigala nga banyeenya mitwe ng’embuzi etenda enkuba nga beebuuza ekyatuuka ku muyimbi waabwe Chameleon, okuba nga yamala emyaka 16 nga Daniella amulaba nga ‘kagoma’ ke kw’akuba.
Daniella Bw'afaanana Kati Ng'ali E Bulaaya.Ekifaananyi kikye ku mukutu gwa Instagram.
“Nze seewuunya Daniella kugamba nti Chameleon yali amukuba kubanga omuze kirabika guli mu ffamire. Wano Weasel Yakuba mukazi n’asigala ng’ayinaayina, Pallaso yasabula Alien Skin ne wataba kikolebwa kyonna..”, omu ku bantu abaakwatiddwako ku mukutu ogwa X (eyali twitter) bwe yawandiise.
Kinnajjukirwa nti mu 2019, amawulire gaasaasaana nti omuyimbi yali aguze amaka amapya e Minnesota mu Amerika era n’akwata ffamire yonna n’agisenguliza eyo.
Chameleon Bw'afaanana Kati.
Ono yategeeza nti ekyamukozesa ekyo kwe kuba nti abaana be ababiri, Alpha ne Abba, baali bafunye sikaala ez’okusomera ku bwereere mu Amerika.
Wano we wava kanzunzu ku kiki ekituufu ekyaliwo kuba okusinziira ku bigambo bya Daniella, alaga nti abaana abaliko yekka era ekyamuggya mu Uganda kwali kwetegula kibambulira kya kumufuula kagoma okumala emyaka 16 ng’asirise!
Bino we bijjidde nga Bukedde yaakafulumya eggulire ku ; Chameleon eriraga nti endabika ye yeeraliikiriza era ng'abawagize be beebuuza ekituufu ekimumazeewo

title: Kenzo ne Dr Hamza bazzeemu okusirisa ababitebya nti tebakwat
content:
Dr. Hamza ne Kenzo bazzeemu okwegwa mu bifuba ne basirisa ababitebya nti tebakwatagana
Omuyimbi Eddy Kenzo azzeemu nate okusisinkana Dr. Hamza Ssebunnya, bba wa Rema Namakula, n’asirisa ababijweteka nti ye ne dokitaali bali kabwa na ngo olw’omukazi.
Kenzo Ne Hamza Lwe Baasisinkana Era Gye Buvuddeko
Bano baasisinkanidde mu kivvulu kya maama Halima Namakula bwe yabadde ajaguza emyaka 50 mu nsiike y’okuyimba ku wooteeri ya Serena wali mu Kampala.
Mu kivvulu kino, Dr. Hamza yayimuse n’agenda ku siteegi Kenzo kwe yabadde ayimiridde, nga musanyufu ddala, n’amugwa mu kifuba.
Bino byonna byabadde bigenda mu maaso nga Rema atudde mu bagenyi abayite nga bw’amwenya, olwo maama we, Halima n’alyoka amugamba nti ‘Namakula nkulaba’, ekibiina ky’abantu kyonna ne kisaanuuka enseko nga bwe kiwaga.
Ababiri bano bulijjo abagambibwa okuba akabwa n’engo olw’okuba baayagala ku mukazi omu, babaddenga basambajja ebijja byogerwa era nga bagamba tebaliimu mbeera yonna ya kwewalana.
Kenzo yategeezeezza era nti ye talina mbiranye yonna eri Hamza ne Rema era abaagaliza birungi byereere. Ediriisa Musuuza era yasiimye maama Halima Namakula olw’okubeera omuzadde omulungi gye bali ne Rema.
Yagambye nti omuntu gwe wali oyagaddeko ne mwawukana kisaanye ojjukire akaseera akalungi ke mwafuna nga muli mwenna naddala bwe muba mwazaaliramu n’abaana kubanga omuntu oyo asigala mu bulamu bwo. Yasiimye maama Halima olw’okubatabaganyanga n’okuba omuzadde omulungi era omuvumu gye bali.

title: Ekiragiro kya kkooti ku Mufti Mubajje kibakubaganya empawa
content:
EKIRAGIRO kya kkooti enkulu e Jinja ku musango oguvunaanibwa Mufti Shaban Mubajje kitabudde abawagizi be n’abaamuwawaabira nga buli omu akitaputa bubwe.

Kyaddiridde omulamuzi Faridah Bukirwa okulagira enjuyi zombi eziri mu musango guno okukakasa nga bassa mu nkola ekiragiro ky’omulamuzi Alexandra Nkonge Rugadya kye yawa nga January 16, 2024 ng’ayimiriza obutateeka mu nkola ebyali bisaliddwawo olukiiko lwa General Assembly olwa UMSC olwatuula nga December 16, ne 17, 2023 ku Gangu Muslim Primary School.

General Assembly yatuulira ku kiragiro ky’omulamuzi Bukirwa eyayimiriza Sheikh Shaban Mubajje ku bwamufti ne bamusikiza Sheikh Abdallah Ssemambo nga Mufti ow’ekiseera.

“Nziramu okuwa ekiragiro n’okukkaatiriza ebiragiro ebyaweebwa omulamuzi Nkonge, nti ebyasalibwawo birina okusigala nga bwebiri, okutuusa nga Kkooti esazeewo ekyenkomeredde’, Omulamuzi Bukirwa bwe yalagidde ku Lwokubiri lwa wiiki eno.

Kyaddiridde bannamateeka booludda oluwawaabirwa okuli; Magoola & Court Advocates ne Nalukoola & Solicitors okwemulugunya ew’omulamuzi nga Mubajje bwazze avvoola n’okutyoboola ebiragiro ebyayisibwa kkooti enkulu ng’agoba abantu nga bwayagala nga yeeyambisa ofiisi y’obwa Mufti. Omulamuzi Bukirwa, yalagidde

enjuyi zombi okukomawo mu kkooti nga May 15, 2024 ku ssaawa 3:30 ez’oku makya batandike okuwulira omusango guno, ogw’engassi.

Omumyuka wa Ssaabawandiisi wa UMSC, Muhammad Aluma yabadde asabye kkooti ebaweeyo emyezi ebiri ng’omusango tegunnawulirwa bamale okufuna ba puliida kuba be baalina okuli;

Adam Kibwanga ne Musa Kabega kkooti yabagoba mu musango. Kino omulamuzi yakigaanye n’agamba nti si waakugwongezaayo.

Mu musango guno Mufti Mubajje ye yaddukira mu kkooti ng’ayagala etunule mu ngeri

ttabamiruka w’Abasiraamu gye yatuuzibwamu e Gangu omwava n’ekiteeso ekimugoba ku bwamufti bwa Uganda.

BULI LUDDA LUTAPUSE BYALWO

Munnamateeka Luyimbaazi Nalukoola yagambye nti omulamuzi Bukirwa yalagidde ekiragiro kya mulamuzi munne Nkonge ekyalagira embeera esigale nga bwe yali esangiddwa mu kiseera ekyo. kiteekebwe mu nkola.

Yajjukizza nti ekiragiro kya Nkonge kyayimiriza kwongera kuteekesa mu nkola ekyokutuuza Sheikh Ssemmambo ku bwa Mufti.

Kyokka tekyayimiriza kyakugoba Mubajje mu ofiisi era mu kiseera kino ofiisi abeera agirimu mu bukyamu.

“Mu kiseera kino Sheikh Mubajje talina kuddamu kukwata ssente za UMSC ng’aziryamu ebicepere kuba ofiisi yagifuluma dda. Ne byabadde akola ng’agenda agoba abantu obuyinza tabulina kuba General Assembly eyatuula mu butuufu

yamugoba era bye yasalawo tewali kkooti yali ebiyimirizza,” Nalukoola

bwagamba.

Yagasseeko nti okusaba kwabwe kwabadde kutegeerekeka bulungi kuba baasabye kkooti Mubajje aleme kuddamu kweyita Mufti wa Uganda era kkooti n’ekikkiriza.

Nalukoola yagambye nti omusango gujja kubanguyira kuba Mubajje yaguloopa mu bukyamu kuba yeeyita Mufti kyatali. Singa yali ayagala kuloopa yandikikoze ng’omuntu Shaban Mubajje. Okuva lwe yawakanya nti bamugobye yasigala mugobe okutuusa lwe banaawulira omusango ne gug...

title: Poliisi eyigga abaasazeeko omuvuzi wa bbooda obulago ne bale
content:
POLIISI e Luweero, ekyagenda mu maaso n'okuyigga abatemu, abaasaze agambibwa okuba omuvuzi wa bbooda obulago, omulambo ne baguleka mu kirombe kya bbulooka.
Ettemu lino, libadde ku kyalo Kavule mu ggombolola y'e Kikyusa mu disitulikiti y'e Luweero, abazigu bwe basse omusajja, omulambo gwe ne bagusuula mmita nga 10 okuva awabadde pikipiki ye nnamba UEQ 569U Bajaj.
Abadde asaliddwa obulago, era ng'aliko ebiwundu eby’amaanyi ku mutwe ne ffeesi ng'ekigendererwa ky'abatemu, tekinnamanyika kubanga pikipiki bagireseewo.
Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Savanna, Sam Twiineamazima, ategeezezza nti batutte embwa ezikonga olusu, naye nga tebalina kya maanyi kye bazudde , era okunoonyereza kugenda mu maaso.

title: Kawempe esirisizza aba UCU
content:
UCU Lady Cardinals 1-1 Kawempe Muslim

NG’ABA UCU bakyajaganya okuwangula liigi y’abakazi mu basketball bwe baakubye JKL ku seeti (4-3), Kawempe Muslim ebasirisizza bw’ebalemesezza wiini eyokuna ey’omuddiring’anwa mu mupiira gw’abakazi.

UCU Lady Cardinals yakoze amaliri ne bagiremesa okulinnya ku ntikko ya liigi y’abakazi (FUFA Women Super League). UCU, yakyazizza Kawempe mupiira gwe yabadde yeetaaga okuwangula okussa akazito ku Kampala Queens ekulembedde n’obubonero 12 mipiira 4 gye bakazannya sizoni eno.

Sharon Nadunga eyali omuteebi wa Kawempe sizoni ewedde ye yabekubidde mu ddakiika 65 so nga Shakirah Nyinagahirwa ye yafunidde Kawempe ey’ekyenkanyi ng’omupiira gubulako eddakiika ntono okuggwa. UCU yasigadde mu kyokubiri n’obubonero 10 so nga yo Kawempe yazze mu kyamukaaga ku bubonero 5.

title: Poliisi eri mu kuyigga mutabani agambibwa okukakkana ku kita
content:
Poliisi eri mu kuyigga mutabani agambibwa okukakkana ku kitaawe n'amutta olw'enkayana z'ettaka n'ennimiro z'ebikajjo.
Ettemu, libadde ku kyalo Buyunze B mu muluka Nakabugu mu Ggombolola y'e Bulongo mu disitulikiti y'e Luuka, abatemu bwe basse musajjamukulu George Isabirye 57 abadde amanyiddwa nga Mukaga.
Ono, bamuttidde mu kisenge ky'ennyumba ye mu kiro ekikeesezza leero ng'asangiddwako ebiwundu ebyamaanyi ku mutwe ng'atemeddwa ebiso.
Abatuuze, olunwe balusonga mu mutabani we Paul Isabirye olw'enkayana z'ettaka n'ennimiro z'ebikajjo bye baludde nga bayombera, nga mu kiseera kino, takubikako kimunywe era poliisi emuyigga.
Omwogezi
wa poliisi mu Busoga North, Samson Lubega, asabye Oyo yenna abeera alabye ku mutabani ono, okutemya ku poliisi ayambeko mu kunoonyereza.

title: Omuduumizi wa Poliisi mu Kampala omuggya alaze w’atandikira
content:
OMUDUUMUZI wa Poliisi mu Kampala n’emiriraano omuggya, ACP Ezekiel Emitu ayingidde ofiisi n’aweebewa ebiragiro okulwanyisa obubinja bw’abamenyi b’amateeka obutadde Kampala n’emiriraano ku bunkenke.

Eggulo, Emitu yakwasiddwa ofiisi ng’adda mu bigere bya Richard Ecega ng’omukolo gwetabiddwaako akulira ebikwekweto mu Poliisi, Frank Mwesigwa. Mwesigwa yategeezezza nti, ekibuga Kampala kirina okubeera ekitebenkevu kuba gwe mutima gw’eggwanga n’amugamba essira alisse ku kulwanyisa obumenyi bw’amateeka ng’awa abaserikale ebiragiro okumaamira ebifo ebimanyiddwa omuli obubinja bw’abamenyi b’amateeka.

Yamugambye nti, asembeze abantu okumpi ne Poliisi bagiwe amawulire agafa mu bitundu byabwe. Yalagidde akulira eby’ekikessi mu Kampala n’emiriraano, SSP Julius Isabirye eyaddidde Ben Kasozi mu bigere okulaba nga bafuna amawulire ag’ekikessi naddala ku bubinja obutadde abantu ku bunkenke.

Emitu yatandikiddewo emirimu nga yasoose kusisinkana abaserikale abatuula ku kitebe kya Kampala n’emiriraano n’abaduumira ebitundu ebikola Kampala n’emiriraano.

AB’E KAWEMPE BALAAJANA

Ab’e Kawempe basabye omuduumizi wa Poliisi omuggay mu Kampala n’emiriraano atandikire ku bubinja bw’abamenyi b’amateeka. Abakulira obubinja buno balina ebifo bye beefunza era tebakkiriza babbi balala kubisaalimbiramu.

Poliisi e Kawempe wadde ezze ekola ebikwekweto n’eyoola abakulira obubinja buno, wayita ennaku ntono ne babayimbula.

Muhamad Kintu ow’e Kanyanya yagambye nti, waliwo ababbi abasula mu mataawo okuli ery’oku Kaleerwe, Bwaise, Kawaala, Kyebando n’awalala. John Kalule ow’e Mulago yanokoddeyo obubinja okuli; Fangoni, Scorpion Gang abasinziira e Bwaise, Lost City e Mulago Nsooba East, Biddugubidugu mu lufula y’oku Kaleerwe, Wolf Gang e Mulago nga kaduumirwa Eddie .

Obubinja buno buli kamu kalina oluguudo lwe keekwata. Okugeza ekkubo lya Sir Apollo Kaggwa eyali aduumirawo eyali amanyiddwa nga Taata Topi yakwatibwa kyokka omumyuka we, Amoti kati y’aduumira akabinja kano. Ku Mawanda okuva ku Kaleerwe okutuuka e Kamwokya, waduumirwa Ric Man.

Ate Nkwanga y’aduumira ababbira ku Alice Kaggwa, olw’e Ttula, Mpereerwe –Nammere. Bano babbisa biso era gye buvuddeko babba ssente e Nansana, poliisi n’ekwata Twaha Nsubuga wabula n’ayimbulwa.

Waliwo akaduumirwa Gerald nga bano batambulira ku pikipiki ne banyakula ebintu ku batambulira ku mabbaali g’oluguudo ne mu jjaamu e Bwaise ne Mpereerwe. Akalala k’e Kyebando nga kakulirwa Kambugu ne Daleni. Bano batambula n’ebijambiya nga katuula ku kasaawe e Kyebando okumpi ne kkampuni y’Abachina. Kano gye buvuddeko ke kaggyirayo Omuyindi ebiso ne kamubbako ssente era baakwatibwa wabula ne bayimbulwa.

Omwogezi wa Poliisi mu Kampala n'emiriraano, Rachael Kawala yagambye nti, Poliisi ekola ebikwekweto emisana n'ekiro.

ABAAYINGIRIDDE OMUMYUKA WA MMEEYA BAKWATIDDWA

Abavubuka babiri abagambibwa okutigomya Gaba mu kabinja ak’omutawaana akamanyiddwa nga Gaba Gaaza bakwatiddwa. Bano be bamu ku baalumbye amaka g’omumyuka wa Mmeeya e Makindye, Joseph Bbaale Bwan...

title: Ssaabasumba asiimye abe Buddo mu lukung'aana lwa Pro-Life
content:
Aba Buddo SS Bakyazizza Olukungaana Lwa ‘Pro-Life’ Ssabasumba Ssemogerere N’abasiima
Engeri Abayizi ba Buddo SS Gyebaanyumisizzaamu Olukungaana lwa “Pro-life’
Ggwe wamma ky’abadde kibigiya kyennyini, essomero lya Buddo SS (erisangibwa mu Kyengera Town Council, Wakiso district) bweryabadde likyaza olukungaana lw’ekibiina kya Uganda Martyrs Pro-life Apostolate, ekiyamba abayizi n’abavubuka okutegeera omugaso gw’obulamu, n’ekitiibwa ky’omuntu.
Abayizi nga basanyusa abantu
Olukungaana luno lwabaddewo ku Lwamukaaga nga March 7 (2026). Lw’akungaanyizza ebikumi n’ebikumi by’abayizi abaavudde mumasomero ga ssiniya, n’am’atendekero ag’awaggulu agali ku musingi gwa Klezia Katolika, agaasusse mu 20.
Mmisa y’akulembeddwa Ssabasumba w’essaza ekkulu ery’e Kampala, Paulo Ssemogerere, ng’ali wamu ne Bwanamuluku w’ekigo ky’e Kasenge, Fr. Stephen Mayanja, Fr. John Mary Kibirige asomesa mu St. Mbaaga’s Major Seminary Ggaba, Fr. Viatory Muvunyi, ne Fr. Vianney Ssekalaala.
Ssabasumba y’asiimye nnyo omukulu w’essomero lya Buddo SS, Lawrence Muwonge, n’ebakola nabo, olw’okutegeka obulungi olukungaana lwa nerubeera kumutindo. Y’amusiimye n’olwokutandika essomero lino, n’okuliikulaakulanya, ate n’okusomesa obulungi abayizi eby’amagezi, empisa ennungi ez’obugunjufu, ate n’okutumbula ebitone byabwe, okusingira ddala muby’emizannyo, n’okuyimba.
Ssaabasumba ng'ali n'abayizi
Abayizi abeetabye mulukungaana y’abakubirizza okutegeera obulungi omugaso gw’obulamu Katonda bweyabawa, n’okubussaamu ekitiibwa. Y’abakubirizza okwewala emize emibi, nga okujjamu embuto, n’obuseegu, gyeyagambye nti gyimalawo obulamu, n’okutyoboola ekitiibwa ky’omuntu, Yasiimye abo bonna abayamba okutaasa obulamu, omuli ba taata neba maama abalungi, n’abasawo.
Fr. Vianney Ssekalaala eyawadde omusomo, y’asabye abayizi bulijjo okukolanga okusalawo okutuufu, nebwekuba nga kukalubamu. Y’abalabudde kukabi akali mu kukozesa obubi omutimbagano gwa Yintaneeti, emikutu gyimugatta bantu (social media), gyeyagambye nti abantu abamu bagyikozesa okusaasaanya n’okuyigiriza abantu, n’addala abaana n’abavubuka obuseegu, n’obutassa kitiibwa mubulamu. Yabasabye tekinolgiya bamweyambise okuyiga ebibagasa. Yabasabye okufuna emikwano emirungi, n’okubaako kyebakola buli kadde, kubanga omuntu atalina byakola aba kiggwa kya Sitaani.
Omukulu w’essomero lya Buddo SS, Lawrence Muwonge y’eebazizza Ssabasumba Ssemogerere okuwa essomero lino omukisa gw’okutegeka olukungaana luno.
Abaana nga bayimba
Abayizi ba Buddo SS Bacamudde Bannaabwe
Abeetabye kumukolo guno baasiimye nnyo abayizi ba Buddo SS, abaayimbye obulungi mu mmisa, ate oluvannyuma nebabasanyusa nennyima ennyuunyuutivu, omwabadde neziwanna Ssabasajja Kabaka Ronald Muwenda Mutebi, n’Obwakabaka bwa Buganda.
Amasomero Gasiimiddwa
Akola nga Dayirekita wa Pro-life, Josephine Kagogwe (eyakiikiridde Dr. Sandra Nabachwa) y’alangiridde Kyambogo University ng’ettendekero eryasinze amalala okukola obulungi. Ate mu masomero ga ssiniya, Cardinal Wamala Vocational School Bulo lyeryasinze. ...

title: Uganda eyolekedde Saudi Arabia okwetaba mu mizannyo gya Isla
content:
Uganda eyolekedde eggwanga lya Saudi Arabia gy'egenda okwetaba mu mizannyo gya Islamic solidarity egigendaokutojjera mu kibuga ekikulu Riyadh okuva nga ennaku zomwezi 7 okutuusa nga 21 omwezi gwa November.
Ekibinja kyabantu 60 kyekisimbuddwa nga kirimu abazanyi 39 nabakungu 21 okuli abasawo, abatendesi nabakungu okuva mu bibiina byemizannyo ebyenjawulo.
Ekibinja Kya Uganda kigenda kukulemberwa Saddick Nassiwu akulira ekibiina ekiddukanya omuzannyo gwa volleyball mu ggwanga.
Abazannyi na'abakungu ba Team
Uganda egenda kwetaba mu mizannyo musanvu okuli Table Tennis, Okuwuga, emisinde ebikonde, okusitula obuzito nekigwo ekizungu.
Emisinde gyegisingako abazanyi abantu nga bali 17 era nga ne kapiteeni wa tiimu egenda Godfrey Changweno muddusi.
Shadir Musa omu ku bakubi bebikonde asuubizza bannayuganda okudda nemidaali egiwerako nga bazimbira ku buwanguzi Bernardo mu ggwanga Lya Kenya gyebaawangude emidaali 15 omwezi guno.
Akulembedemu ekibinja kya Uganda Saddick Nassiwu alabudde abazanyi okukuuma empisa nokwewala emize gyokukwatirira abakazi mu ggwanga Lya Saudi Arabia.
Nassiwu era abalabudde okwewala okwetikka omwenge nebiragalalagala ebiyinza okubakwasa abobuyinza mu ggwanga eryo.
Ye ssaabawandiisi wakakiiko kemizannyo mu ggwanga aka Uganda Olympic committee Beatrice Ayikoru ajjukizza abazanyi okukola namaanyi nekigendererwa ekyokufuna obubonero obubatwala mu mizannyo gya Olympics mu ggwanga lya America mu 2028.
Abamu ku bakungu abatambudde ne Team
Akiikiridde ssaabawandiisi wakakiiko akakulira emizannyo mu ggwanga Dr Bernard Ogwel, Milton Chebet ajjukiza abazanyi ku nsako Eva mu gavumenti buli bannabyamizannyo webawangula emidaali ku mutendera gwensi yonna.
Amawanga 57 gegagenda okwetaba mu mpaka zomwaka guno ezomulundi ogwomukaaga nga Saudi Arabia egenda kuzitegeka omulundi ogwokubiri mu byafaayo.
Uganda ezze yeetaba mu mizannyo gyonna egisembyeyo nga omugatte yaakawangulayo emidaali 11 okuli egya zaabu ebiri, egya Feza mukaaga negyekikomo esatu.

title: Majembere akoledde abawagizi ba Nrm SACCO  e Lubaga nassaamu
content:
SSENTEBE wa NRM e Lubaga era omuwabuzi wa pulezidenti omukulu ku nsonga za Baganda, Ivan Majambere Kamuntu Ssemakula, agguddewo SACCO eri bannaLubaga ne bannayuganda okweggya mu bwavu.
Majembere ng'alaga cceeke ya SACCO
Ekibiina ky’obwegassi kino Majambere agguddewo ofiisi zaakyo ku Kabuusu okuliraana ekifo kya Monalisa, nga y’omu ku bayima baakyo nti, naye agigguliddewo bannayuganda bonna wadde ng’ekitebe kiri Lubaga gyaweerereza, nga kigendereddwaamu okusitula ebyenfuna bya bannayuganda aba wansi okweggya mu bwavu, mulimu okutereka n’okwewola ku magoba amatono enyo.
Ekibiina kino Majambere akitaddemu ssente obukadde 200 okukitandika zaagambye nti aziwaddeyo ye ng’omuntu, okwebaza banna Lubaga, ba nnakampala ne bannayuganda bonna okutwalizaawamu olw’obuwagizi obungi bwebaawa pulezidenti Museveni naawangulira waggulu mu kalulu akaakaggwa.
Agamba nti ,alabye ng’okukola akabaga abasalire ente balye n’okunywa nga tekijja kubaganyula, kwekusalawo abateerewo ekibiina kino ekituumiddwa “Step Foward”, abantu baasobole okukingira beekulaakulanye ate nga waakwongera okubasakira ssente z’okwekulaakulanya ziyingire mu kibiina.
Majembere ng'ayogera mu kutongoza SACCO
Awabudde abantu okwettanira enkola y’okukolera awamu mu bwegassi, kyagambye nti kyanguya enkulaakulana, kuba ky’otasobola kukola wekka ate musobola okukikolera awamu n’okituukako.
Agamba nti yavaayo n’asaka SACCO eno ejje mu Lubaga, nti wabula ssi yiye ng’omuntu, ya bantu, wabula ayagala okulaba ng’abantu beefaako okweggya mu bwavu nga bagiyingira batereke n’okwewola okukulaakulanya bizinensi zaabwe n’okuzitandika, baasitule ebyenfuna basobole okubeezaawo obulamu obulungi. Ssente za SACCO eno baakuzeewolera ku magoba ga bitundu 8 ku 100 ezisoboka eri buli omu.
Naasaba banna Lubaga kino obutakifuula kya byabufuzi, bayingire awatali kusosola mu bibiina byabufuzi, bajje bagyeyambise okwekulaakulanya okugenda mumaaso.
Agamba nti, pulezidneti Museveni yabayigirizza ekigambo “Okuceenuula”, ekitegeeza nti “kwata ku munno omuyambe omuyimuse”, kuba baagala embeera embi eve mu bantubakomye okukolerera mmere ya leero, beetegekere bulungi obulamu bw’omumaaso.
Abazadde nga bawandiisa abaana baabwe okuyambibwako okusoma
Yeebazizza pulezidenti Museveni, General Salim Saleh n’omuwanika wa NRM mu ggwanga Nekesa Oundo, baagambye nti bakoze kinene okubazzaamu amaanyi, nabo okukwata ku bantu ba wansi.
Agamba nti, mu kiseera kitono mumaaso ekibiina kino kigenda kutongozebw amu butongole omukolo ogunabaako abakulu mu ggwanga nabo abausubirwa okwongera okukwatairako abantu mu sacco eno.
Akabonero akalaga erinnya lya SACCO
Abatuuze b’e Lubaga beebazizza Majambere olwa SACCO eno, nebamusaba okukyongera mumaaso ayongeremu amaanyi okubasakira beeggye mu bwavu.
Majambere era aliko ne bassale zaawaddeyo eri abazadde ng’akolagana n’amasomero ag’enjawulo ziyambeko ku baana okusoma, agamba buli lunaku afuna abantu abatakka wansi wa 20 nga bamusaba okubakwatirako mu kusoma kw’abaamna baabwe nga ye nsonga asazeewo okubasakira ne...

title: America etuusizza emmundu empya mu ddwa
content:
TEHRAN, Iran

AMERICA etuusizza emmundu empya mu ddwaaniro n’etandika olutalo ekitundu ekyokubiri, Pulezidenti Donald Trump mw’alabulidde nti;

Waliwo abanene mu Iran abakyakola emputtu abeetaaga okukolako wadde mu kusooka tetwalowooza nti beetaaga okuggyawo.

TRUMP YEEWEREDDE AYATOLLAH WA IRAN OMUPYA

Pulezidenti Trump okutuuka okulabula abalala ab’okukolako mu lutalo lwa Iran, yatandikidde ku Ayatollah omupya, Mojtaba Khamenei, gwe yayogeddeko nti, ennaku ze ku nsi ziyinza okuba entono.

Trump yagambye nti, ‘Iran’s next leader would not last long without the approval of the United States.’

Ebyo bitegeeza nti, okuggyako nga America ekkiririzza mu mukulembeze Iran gw’eronda, ennaku z’asigazza ziba ntono. "Alina okuba nga America emukkirizza nti ye mutuufu eyalondeddwa," Trump bwe yategeezezza bannamawulire ba ABC News.

Kino w’akyogeredde nga wayise ennaku ntono ng’amaze okugamba nti ajja kwenyigira butereevu mu kusalawo omukulembeze wa Iran ew’omu maaso.

Trump abadde n’obuzibu bw’omukambwe wa Iran ow’oku ntikko, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei eyattiddwa ku Lwomukaaga luli ng’agamba nti, ye yali alowooleza mu kuwagira obutujju mu nsi yonna, ne mu byokuweesa nukiriya ne mizayiro za Ballistic ez’amaanyi ng’eby'okuteesa si by’aliko.

Nga kuno kw’agatta n’okutirimbula bannansi abeekubira enduulu ku kulinnyirira eddembe ly’obuntu, n’ebyenfuna ebigootaanye.

Okwogera ebyo nga Trump amaze n’okusindika mizayiro empya mu ddwaaniro ezigenda okukolera ku nnyonyi ekika kya B-52 Long Range Strategic Bombernga zino nazo zaatuuse dda muddwaaniro.

EBYAFAAYO BYA AYATOLLAH OMUPYA

Amawulire ga Tasnim News Agency mu Iran gagamba nti, Ayatollah omupya Mojtaba Khamenei, yatandise dda emirimu mu bwerinde obw’amaanyi. Oyo ye mutabani wa Ayatollah eyattiddwa.

Ono ali ku bwerende bwa kunoonyezebwa attibwe nga kitaawe kubanga kigambibwa nti naye obukambwe bumuli nga bwa kitaawe eby’okuteesa tebimwanguyira amanyi bya mmundu.

Abamumanyi bagamba nti kitaawe yamubeeza nnyo ku lusegere lwe nga buli ky’akola omutabani akiraba.

Nti n’okulondebwa olukiiko lwa Assembly of Experts, baamaze kukakasa nti kumpi y’oyo Ayatollah eyattiddwa gw’ali abasongeddeko.

Ono era, alina obuganzi mu ggye lya Iran erya Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC).

Ekyo kyayanguyirizza abalonzi kubanga eggye eryo kati kwe bayimiridde mu by’olutalo wadde nga linafuyiziddwa nnyo ennumba ezirikolebwako amagye ga America n’aga Yisirayiri.

Kyokka alinamu okuwakanyizibwa okuva mu bantu ba wansi nga bagamba nti mukambwe kumpi nga kitaawe, ekintu ekyabatama ne basaba akyuseemu ku ekyo bw’anaaba ayagala okuwanAbajaasi

title: Amateeka agassiddwa ku beesimbyewo
content:
AKAKIIKO k’ebyokulonda kafulumizza amateeka amakakali agagenda okugobererwa abeesimbyewo ku Bwapulezidenti nga banoonya obululu.

Abantu 8 ne baasunsuddwa okuvuganya okuli; Yoweri Kaguta Museveni (NRM), Joseph Mabiriizi (CP), Mugisha Muntu (ANT), Robert Kyagulanyi Ssentamu (NUP), Nandala Mafabi (FDC), Robert Kasibante (National Peasants Party), Mubarak Munyagwa (Common Man’s Party) ne Frank Bulira Kabinga (Revolutionary People’s Party).

Ssentebe w’akakiiko k’ebyokulonda, Simon Byabakama, yalabudde abeesimbyewo obuteetantala kukuba kampeyini ng’olwa September 29, 2025 terunnatuuka era n’asuubiza okutegeka akalulu akalimu amazima n’obwenkanya.

Okunoonya obululu kujja kutandika mu butongole okuva September 29, 2025 okutuuka January 12, 2026.

Akakiiko kagenda kumala kutuuza bonna abeesimbyewo bakkaanye ku bifo n’ennaku mwe bagenda okukubira kampeyini. Tewali akkirizibwa kukuba nkung’aana mu bifo ebirimu abantu abangi nga obutale, enguudo, okuliraana amasomero n’amalwaliro ng’ekigendererwa kya kwewala kutaataaganya bantu balala abakola ebyabwe.

Kabangali z’abakuumi ezaaweereddwa abavuganya tezirina kutambuza beesimbyewo wadde omuntu omulala yenna.

Abaserikale abakuumi balina okukuumaamaka g’eyeesimbyewo n’okubeera mu buli kifo gy’alaga nga bw’aba ayagadde. Si buvunaanyizibwa bw’avuganya okuwa abakuumi ebiragiro ebikwata ku kye balina okukola.

Agenda okutegeka olukiiko alina okusooka okutegeeza poliisi ekifo ne bakirambula eran ne bakakasa nga kiri mu mbeera etataataaganya balala.

Tewali akkirizibwa kunoonya bululu kusukka ssaawa 12:00 ez’olweggulo era anaakwatibwa waakubonerezebwa.

Buli eyeesimbyewo alina okulaga akakiiko emikutu gy’amawulire gy’agenda okutambulako n’ennaku kwagendera era n’omukutu ne gulaga nti mwetegefu okumukyaza. Eyeesimbyewo ng’anoonya obululu akkirizibwa kukozesa lulimi lukuma mu bantu muliro, olutabangula emirembe oba okukunga abalala nga basiga obukyayi mu madiini n’amawanga.

Okuggyako ng’avuganya alina olukusa olw’enjawulo nga Pulezidenti, abavuganya tebateekeddwa kweyambisa bintu bya Gavumenti nga emmotoka okunoonya obululu.

Ebikolwa by’okugulirira abalonzi nga babawa ssente oba ebirabo mu ngeri y’okubasendasenda okulonda omuntu tebikkirizibwa mu kiseera ky’okunoonya obululu. Bwe gukusinga osibwa emyaka esatu oba okusasula 1,440,000/-.

Kyokka etteeka terikwata muntu agabula ebyokulya n’okunywa mu nkiiko eziteekateeka kampeyini.

Kyokka akakiiko kaasuubizza nga bwe kajja okufulumya amateeka amalala nga bamaze okusisinkana abeesimbyewo ne bakkaanya ku bifo n’ennaku ze bagenda okunoonyezaamu obululu.

Ebikwata ku beesimbyewo abatamanyiddwa nnyo mu bantu

ELTON JOSEPH MABIRIIZI Mabiriizi yinginiya wa byamasannyalaze era nga Paasita eyeesimbiddewo

ku tiketi ya CP. Yasooka okwesimbawo mu 2016 nga talina kibiina n’afuna obululu, 24,498 nga bye bitundu 0.25 ku buli 100. Ku bantu omunaana abaavuganya ye yasemba.

title: Winnie Nwagi acoomedde abamalako bassereebu emirembe olw’emy
content:
WINNIE Nwagi acoomedde abamalako bassereebu emirembe olw’emyaka. Agamba nti ye kimunyiiza olw’abantu aboogerera bassereebu naddala abakazi nti bakuliridde mu myaka ekiviirako n’abamu okutya okwogera emyaka gyabwe.
Nwagi akolimye nti n’abeeyita abato nabo bajja. Ayongerako nti ye buli mwaka gw’agutuukako agujaguza kuba akimanyi abamu bafa nga tebagituuseeko. Okumanya yabadde mukaawu, agamba nti abayimbi abatuuka mu myaka 30 bakoma okwogera emyaka gyabwe nga bakiraba nga ekintu ekiswaza.
Yasabye abantu obutakaka balala kufumbirwa kuba buli omu alina obudde bwe bw’akoleramu ekintu.

title: Omuvubuka agambibwa okutta omukozi wa University ya UCU, bam
content:
Omuvubuka agambibwa okutta omukozi wa University ya UCU, bamukunudde mu disitulikiti y'e Budaka gy'agambibwa okuba nti gy 'abadde yekwese.
Pamela Tumwebaze abadde akola nga Director of Student Affairs ku UCU, yattiddwa mu wiiki eno, abazigu bwe bamulumbye mu makaage agali mu Guafu e Seeta mu disitulikiti y'e Mukono ne bamutuga n'afa nga yakatuusibwa mu ddwaaliro
Kigambibwa nti omutemu eyalabiddwako ng'ayambadde sikaati y'omugenzi, yakuliise ne laptop ye, n'ebintu ebirala.
Akwatiddwa ye Ddaka Hussein eyaliko omukozi mu maka g'omugenzi era nga kigambibwa nti bamusanze n'ebimu ku bintu by'omugenzi.
Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala, Recheal Kawala, agambye nti okunoonyereza kugenda mu maaso

title: Amagye geeganye eby'okuwenja Bobi Wine
content:
AMAGYE gavuddeyo ne gawakanya ebibadde bitambula nti ebikwekweto bye bakola ku nguudo za Kampala bigendereddwaamu kuwenja Pulezidenti wa NUP Robert Kyagulanyi Ssentamu, ali mu kwekweka okuva akalulu ka bonna lwe Kaggwa mu January.
Eggulo enguudo ezifuluma n’okuyingira Kampala, zaabaddeko emisanvu egisuuliddwaako amagye ne Poliisi, era nga baliko emmotoka ze bayimiriza nga bwe bazeekebejja, ekyaleetedde amawulire okusaasaana nti banoonya Kyagulanyi.
Ne Kyagulanyi yennyini ng’ayita ku mukutu gwe ogwa X, yavumiridde ebikwekweto bino, n’agamba nti gavumenti eyaliko mu nsiko yandibadde ekimanyi nti tesobola kukwata muntu abantu gwe basazeewo okukweka.
Kato akola nga omwogezi w’amagye Col. Chris Magezi avuddeyo n’afulumya ekiwandiiko, n’agamba nti ebikwekweto byabwe bigendereddwaamu kutereeza ntambula ku nguudo za Uganda, okulaba ng’abagoba b’ebidduka bagondera amateeka g’oku nguudo.
Era emotoka ezitaliiko nnamba, ezirina ennamba enjingirire, ezirimu obugombe obukanga abantu ku makubo nga balowooza waliwo omukungu ayitawo, n’abamenya amateeka abalala ku nguudo bali mu kukwatibwa, okusobola okuzza obutebenkevu ku nguudo.
Eby’okuwenja Kyagulanyi yagambye nti si bituufu, era teri amunoonya, kubanga tebalina kye bamwagaza ng’abeebyokwerinda.
Okuva akalulu bwe Kaggwa, Kyagulanyi ali mu kwekweka, ng’agamba nti yagwa mu lukwe lwa gavumenti okwagala okumukwata bamuggalire, kwe kusalawo okugira nga yeekwese.
Abavuzi b’ebidduka Magezi yabasabye okukolagana obulungi n’abeebyokwerinda, omuli Poliisi n’amagye, okusobola okutereeza ebyentambula ku nguudo za Uganda.

title: 'Muweereze abantu so si kuweerezebwa'
content:
Rev. Patrick Kamara, Omusumba avunaanyizibwa ku nkung'aana z’enjiri ezikolebwa mu maka ag’enjawulo mu Kkanisa ya All Saints Nakasero ye yabuulidde bino. Enjiri yabadde ekwata ku mukulembeze omulungi mu kkanisa ya All Saints Nakasero.
“ Mukama waffe yesu yali mukulembeze mulungi ng’ayayogera mu kigambo kye nti yajja kuweereza so si kuweerezebwa,” bwe yayongeddeko.
Rev. Patrick Kamara
Yasabye bwe baba mu bukulembeze basabe era basiibe olwo Mukama abawe amagezi basobole okubeera abakulembeze abalungi abajja okuweereza eggwanga lyabwe.
Yabakuutidde okusaba ennyo Katonda abayambe baleme kukulembeza ebyo byokka bye baagala olw’okutuukiriza ebiruubirirwa byabwe.
Yagambye nti Yesu bwe yajja yaleeta emirembe n’essuubi era balina okumulabirako ng’omukulembeze omulungi nabo bakole ebintu ebiteeka emirembe mu bantu.

title: Chameleone ayongedde akazito ku Alien Skin
content:
OMUYIMBI Jose Chameleone ayongedde okuteeka akazito ku muyimbi munne Patrick Mulwana amanyiddwa nga Alien Skin ku bigambibwa nti alina akakwate ku kufa kw’omuzinyi Wilfred Namuwaya abadde yeeyita Top Dancer.

Chameleone ng’ayita ku mukutu gwe gwa X, yagambye minisita w’abavubuka Balaam Barugahara aveeyo akulemberemu olutalo lw’okukola ku Alien Skin, kubanga eggwanga likaabye ekimala olw’effujjo lye.

Yayongeddeko nti ye kennyini azze atiisibwatiisibwa Alien Skin ne guluupu ye, kyokka n’asalawo okusirika akuume emirembe, naye we bituuse wateekwa okubaawo ekikolebwa.

Minisita Balaam naye mu kukwanukula Chameleone yakkaanyizza naye, era n’asaba ebitongole byokwerinda okwang’anga obumenyi bw’amateeka buno awatali kutya wadde okuttira omuntu yenna ku liiso kuba teri ali waggulu w’amateeka.

Balaam yalabudde nti singa effujjo nga lino terikolwako, Uganda yandifuna obuzibu bw’agabinja g’abamenyi b’amatteeka agatwalira amateeka mu ngalo ne goonoona ensi, nga bwe kiri mu ggwanga lya Haiti.

Omwogezi wa Poliisi mu Kampala, Patrick Onyango yagambye nti Poliisi ekyanoonyereza ku fayiro y’okuttibwa kwa Top Dancer, era abanoonyerezebwako ye Alien Skin yennyini, ne basajja be okuli Babu, Commander Mudogo, Ibra Kabadiya ne Mijagulo.

Kiteeberezebwa nti bano be baakuba Namuwaya (Top Dancer) nga bamuvunaana okubaddukako mu kibinja kyabwe.

Okusinziira ku katambi akatambula ku mikutu gya ‘social media’, akaakwatibwa nga Top Dancer tannafa, kamulaga ng’agalamidde wansi ku seminti, ng’aliko bannyonnyola nti musajja wa Alien, Babu yamusanga mu Ndeeba n’amukwata, n’amutwala ku kitebe kya Alien Skin ekya Fangone Forest e Makindye mu Kizungu ne bamukuba mu lubuto ne ku nsingo ne bamubbako n’essimu ye eya Samsung, kwossa omuzindaalo gwe.

Ensonda ku poliisi e Katwe zaategeezezza Bukedde nti nga fayiro ya Top Dancer tennajja, babadde balina fayiro endala bbiri ku Alien Skin nga zeekuusa ku kufa kw’abantu. Wabula bwe twabuuzizza Onyango ku fayiro zino yagambye tazimanyi, okuggyako emu yokka eya Top Dancer.ALIEN SKIN YEEWOZEZZAAKO

Alien Skin yavuddeyo ng’ayita ku mikutu gye egya ‘social media’, ne yeegaana eby’okutta Top Dancer, era n’agamba nti zino ntalo za bayimbi, abamulwanyisa.

Yawadde eky’okulabirako nti fayiro y’okufa kwa Top Dancer abasinga okugipika bayimbi, era poliisi tebaagala kugiwa mukisa kunoonyereza, wabula baagala kulaba Alien Skin nga ali mu kkomera.

Era yagambye nti ye tagenda kwekweka kubanga si muzzi wa misango, nga emboozi ezigenda maaso zonna zigendereddwaamu kumunafuya.

Alien Skin azze attunka n’abayimbi naddala aba ffamire ya Mayanja okuli Chameleone ne Pallaso, era abavubuka abagambibwa okuba aba Pallaso baasalako Alien Skin ne bakuba mmotoka ye, era ye okubasimattuka yayita mu ddirisa. Bano baali beesasuza olw’effujjo lye balumiriza Alien Skin okubakolako enfunda eziwera.

Omwaka oguwedde Alien Skin yasindikibwa e Luzira, oluvannyuma lw’ekibinja kye okusalako eddwaaliro ly’e Nsambya ne bakola effujjo eritagambika omwali n’okukuba abasawo nga b...

title: Zanie Brown afulumizza vidiyo y'oluyimba lwa 'Si Yiyo' n'acamula abawagizi be
content:
Omuyimbi Zanie Brown ( Zanie Namugenyi) afulumizza omuggo gwa vidiyo ya 'Eno Ensi Si Yiyo' n'acamula abawagizi be!

Zanie era nga C.E.O wa Zanie Brown 4 Schools abadde amaze akabanga ng'abantu beebuuza kiki ky'afumba vidiyo y'oluyimba lwa 'Si Yiyo' yagitadde ku Lwakubiri nga April 1, 2025 n'akkakkanya ababadde bamubuuza akabuliriro.

Vidiyo y'oluyimba nnungi okuzaama kyokka ekisinga okugifuula ey'enjawulo bwe bubaka bw'oluyimba!

Si Yiyo lukwata bantu abeegulumizza okusukkuluma ku balala, n'abo abakozesa amaanyi agasukkiridde eri abalala omuli okutta, okutulugunya n'ebikolwa eby'ekko kyokka nga n'ekyewuunyisa, be bakulembeze okufuuka kyesirikidde!!

Ab'emimwa egitasirika baatandise dda okutema 'omugambo' nti luno oluyimba lwa 'nkyukakyuka', so nga lukwata ku mbeera ya bulijjo n'ebyo abantu bye bayitamu mu bifo ebyenjawulo gye bawangaalira.

Ku nkomerero ya vidiyo, Zanie annyonnyola amakulu g'oluyimba nti eno ensi teriiko nnyiniyo okuggyako Mukama Katonda mw'agambira nti abakulembeze, abagagga, baseerebu n'abo abalina obuyinza n'amanyi nga n'ensi ebatya tebalina kwerabira nti ku lunaku luli olw'enkomerero, buli ssekinnoomu ajja kuyimirira mu maaso ga nnannyini nsi Mukama Katonda awe embalirira olw'ebikolwa bye wansi w'enjuba

'Nnalulungi' Zanie n'afundikira nti: "Eno ensi ssi yiyo, nange ssi yange ate na bali ssi yaabwe".

Obubaka buno bukubiriza buli muntu okweyisa obulungi eri munne, okutambulira mu kwagala kwa Katonda kubanga Katonda kwagala era atulagira okwagalana so ssi kukyawagana.

title: Omusama Juliet Zawedde ali Uganda akola by'ayagala
content:
OMUSAMA Juliet Zawedde ali Uganda akola by’ayagala. Yayingirawo nga Juky 14 era ku kisaawe e Ntebe yayanirizibwa omuyimbi Jose Chameleone ne bazadde be Gerald ne Prossy Mayanja n’abantu abalala abaamutonera ebimuli.

Zawedde yajja n’omuyimbi w’e Tanzania, Rutta Maximilian Bushoke era tamuva ku lusegere. Kigambibwa nti Julie ng’abasinga bwe bamuyita yajja kuwummulako ssaako okujaguza amazaalibwa ge.

Zawedde Ng'azina Ne Bushoke

Akabaga k’okujjaguza amazaalibwa yakategese ku bbaala ya Noni Vie mu Kampala era nga abaagendayo bali bayite bokka nga kaliyo ku Lwomukaaga nga July 19.

Eno waali obukuumi obw’ekika kya waggulu. Olw’okuba Chamili mu kiseera ekyo yali Burundi gye yalina ekivvulu, akabaga teyaliiko wabula muto we Weasel ne Bushoke be baasanyusa Zawedde n’abagenyi be. Bushoke yayimbiramu ne maama wa Zawedde akayimba akaamucamula.

Akabaga kaaliko ebyokunywa n’emyenge egy’ebbeeyi. Ku Lwokusatu lwa wiiki eno, Zawedde y’omu ku baagenze ku bbaala ya The Villa e Bukoto.

Eno baabadde bakyazizza Jose Chameleone ng’omuyimbi omukulu. Chamili eyatandise okuyimba ng’essaawa ziri mu 6:30 ez’ekiro bakira asuulamu omuziki ng’eno Zawedde bw’anyumirwa ng’atudde ne Bushoke.

Zawedde yasanyuse n’alinnya siteegi okufuuwa Chamili ssenteera wano we yatandikidde okumunywegera ku matama nga bw’amuwambaatidde. Bwe yabadde ava ku siteegi yamunywegedde ku mimwa, enduulu n’etta abaabadde mu bbaala.

Oluvannyuma Bushoke naye yalinnye ku siteegi olwo bbandi ya VIPI bbandi eyabadde ekuba n’esuulamu oluyimba lwa ‘Usiende Mbali’ lwe yayimba ne Juliana Kanyomozi, olwo Zawedde n’alumba siteegi n’azina nga bw’amunyweza, ekyayongedde okucamula abadigize.

Mu kiro ekyo kye kimu ono Zawedde yalabwako ng’atudde ku Bushoke ng’amuleze wabula ng’alinga akooye ennyo.

title: Abantu babiri abagambibwa okukuba omuntu akatayimbwa ne bamu
content:
Abantu babiri abagambibwa okukuba omuntu akatayimbwa ne bamuttira ku Kaleerwe mu Kampala, embwa ya poliisi ebakutte.
Kidiridde abatemu okutta Kabugo 34 omutuuze ku Kaleerwe, omulambo ne baguleka okumpi n'olukomera lwa garagi.
Abakwatiddwa kuliko Sebunnya n'omulala ategeerekese nga Johnson era nga bakuumirwa ku poliisi e Wandegeya.
Kabugo yakubiddwa akatayimbwa eggulo, omulambo era gwasangiddwa okumpi n'olukomera lwa Dusuma Garage, ekyawalirizza poliisi okutwala embwa yaayo ekonga olusu gye bayita Pepper n'ewunyiriza.
Yasoose mu mita nga kkumi okuva we battidde omuntu n'eyingira mu kayumba k'omukuumi wa garage ne yeyongerayo okuzuula akatayimbwa okuli omusaayi n'effumu era bombi ne bakwatibwa.
Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala Recheal Kawala, agambye nti bakyababuuza akana n'akataano okuzuula ekituufu.

title: Moureen Nantume ayogedde ensonga ezaamuwalirizza okulokoka
content:
Maureen Nantume, omuyimbi wa bbandi, okufaananako bayimbi banne Desire Luzinda, Nina Roz, Grace Nakimera ne Zanie Brown annyonnyodde ekyamulokosezza.
Nantume agamba nti okusalawo okusenza Yesu kyaddiridde ebbanga ly'amaze nga yeewadeyo eri Katonda.
Ng'ayogerera ku ttivvi emu, Nantume yalambuludde ku nkolagana ye empya gy'alina ne Katonda n'agamba nti Nantume yalambuludde ku nkolagana empya gye yafuna ne Yesu n'engeri gye yeewaddeyo okwongera okuzimba enkolagana ye ne Katonda etabadde ya bulijjo.
"Waaliwo ekiseera we nnali nneetaaga okuwaayo omutima gwange eri Yesu Kristo. Bwe nakikola omwoyo gwange gwawummula mw'eno enzikiriza empya. Eno nkyukakyuka ya muggundu mu mutima gwange era ekyusizza engeri gye mbadde ntegeeramu Yesu Kristo," Moureen bwe yategeezezza.

title: Emirambo gy'aboluganda abasatu abafiira mu kabenje e South Africa gituusiddwa mu maka ga kitaabwe e Kawaala
content:
Emirambo gy'aboluganda abasatu abafiira mu kabenje e South Africa gituusiddwa mu maka ga kitaabwe e Kawaala wakati mu miranga n'okwaziirana.

Emirambo nga gituuka ewaka

Ab'oluganda bano abafiira mu kabenje e South Africa kuliko; Lilian Namwanje 32, Raymond Ssenabulya 29 ne Sheilah Mukasa 22 abadde asoma univasite, nga bonna baana ba mulangira Joseph Wasajja Kitaawe ne Jamirah Mukasa, omutuuze mu zooni ya Kawaala II, mu muluka gw'e Kasubi, ggombolola y'e Lubaga.

Bafiira mu kabenje e South Africa nga January 10, 2026 bwebaali bagenda ku Kitebe Kya Uganda e South Africa okuzza obujja Passport ya munnaabwe.

Aba Rhino Funeral Service nga batuusa emirambo ewaka

Emirambo gyabwe gyakomezeddwaawo kuno kkampuni ya Rhino enkola ku by'okuziika, gyatuusibwa ku mmande ya wiiki Eno, negiterekebwa mu kkampuni ya Rhino enkola ku by'okuziika, leero ku lw'okusatu negireetebwa mu maka ga kitaabwe e Kawaala zone II.

Twaha Kasozi, ssentebe wa ba nnayuganda e South Africa agambye nti, abagenzi ababadde bababeera ku kyalo Naas baafa nga 10 January, bwebaali bava okuzza Visa ya munaabwe obujja, ente eyali mu luguudo yeeyavaako akabenje emmotoka nezetomera bwenyi ku bwenyi ku kyalo Nkomazi mu Municipality Nkomazi.9
