title: Omudigize awenjuliddde Mamuli Katumba 'ekyensuti' n'afa ekit
content:
Mamuli Katumba acamudde abadigize ku Kaleerwe nabo ne bamulaga okwagala kyokka kimuweddeko om uku badigize bw’azze ku siteegi okuzina naye, n’amukunamira naye n’akiggyamu enjawulo.
Ono avuddeyo anyeenya mutwe nga embuzi etenda enkuba n’avaayo ng'anyeenya mutwe ng'agamba ab'oku Kaleerwe bulijjo bwe mutyo.
Bano Omuziki Gwabayingidde Ne Babiibya Ku Galibenjole.
Abadigize baacakalidde ku bbaala ya M DE BOSS mu Dobi Zzooni ku Kaleerwe e Kawempe mu kivvulu ekyategekeddwa Ssenga Sarah Nansasi omuyimbi wa kadongo Kamu.
Ssenga Sarah Nansasi Ndibassa Ng'ayimba.
Kino kyatuumiddwa ‘obufumbo si Finger ‘ ng'abamu ku bayimbi abaacamudde abadigize kwe kwabadde ne Mamuli Katumba ng'ono olwayiyeemu oluyimba lwa basajja abaagala ebyendola byana biwala ne bimusalako ne bizina nga bimulaga ebyensuti.
Abayimbi abalala abaacamudde abadigize kwabaddeko Fatumah Namakula , Meddie Kasujja , Rashid Luwagga , Muzeeyi Katula n'abalala.
Mwana Muwala Ng'agezaako Okukuba Mamuli Katumba Ekyensuti!

title: Ebigambo by'abantu tebinterebura, omuntu wange anjagala - De
content:
Desire Luzinda ayingiddewo mu ggwanga okwetegekera emikolo egiriyo wiiki ejja.
Ono atuuse ku ssaawa 8:30 ez’emisana ku kisaawe Entebbe okuva mu America era ng’ayanirizibwa muninkini we Levixone kw’ossa mikwano gye.
Luzinda ne Levixone emikolo gyabwe gigenda kutandika n’okwanjula ku Lwokubiri lwa wiiki ejja olwo embaga egoberere.
Levixone ng'ayaniriza Desire ku kisaawe.
Okusinziira ku nsonda Bukedde z’esobodde okwogerako nazo, tutegeezeddwa nti embaga ya bano egenda kubeera mu ggwanga lya Rwanda.
Bw’abadde yakatuuka ku kisaawe agambye nti musanyufu nti emikolo gigenda kubawo kubanga omuntu we amwagala nnyo.
Agambye nti yeesunze okumugatako erinnya ly’omwami we era nti yasazeewo okugattibwa naye kubanga yakiraba nga Katonda yakikola nga baakubeera bombi.
Luzinda agambye ebigambo by’abantu tebimuyigula ttama kubanga abadde mu butaala okumala ebbanga era n’ayogerwako.

title: Bajaguza emyaka 147 egy'enkolagana y'obusiraamu n'obukatulik
content:
Ssabasumba w’essaza ekkulu ery’e Kampala, Paul Ssemogerere asiimye ab’ennyumba y;omugenzi Amir Ssekikubo olw’okukuuma omukwano n’enkolagana y’Abasiraamu n’Abakatoliki, jjajjaabwe oyo gyeyateekawo bweyabudamya mumakaage ag’e Kitebi abaminsane ababereberye, Fr. Simeon Lourdel Mapeera ne Bro. Delmas Amans, ate oluvannyuma n’abakolera entegeka okulaba Ssekabaka Muteesa I mulubiri lwe e Lubaga, gyebaafunira olukusa okuyigiriza Eddiini Katolika mu Buganda.
Paul Ssemogerere ng'ali ne bannaddiini abalala
Ssabasumba okusiima kuno y’akukoledde ku Klezia y’ekisomesq ky’e Kitebi eyabbulwamu Fr. Mapeera, gyeyakulembereredde ekitambiro kya mmisa ey’okujjukira emyaka 147 bukya Ssekikubo asisinkana era n’asuza abaminsane bano. Amir Ssekikubo yali mwami wa Kabaka, eyali avunaanyizibwa ku ntambulaze, okusinziira ku muzzukulu we Nusura Namutebi.
Omukolo gw’okujjukira ensisinkanoye n’abaminsane Abakatoliki gwabaddewo ku Ssande nga February 22.
Ssabasumba y’asiimye Amir Ssekikubo olw’obuyambi bweyawa abaminsane, era neyeebaza mutabaniwe, omugenzi Musa Kaggwa olw’okutwala mu maaso omukwano guno, n’atuuka nokusala puloti ku ttaka lya kitaawe, n’ajiwa Klezia era nga kwekwazimbibwa klezia y’ekijjukizo kua Mapeera.
Ssaabasumba Ssemogerere ng'awayaamu ne Min. JC Muyingo
Mumukolo guno, bazzukulu ba Amir Ssekikubo ngabakulembeddwamu Nusura Namutebi baawadde Ssabasumba obweyamo ngabwebajja okusigala ngabatambulira wamu nabakulembeze ba Klezia e Lubaga, era nebamukwasa ekiwandiiko ekikakasa obwannanyini famire bweyawa Klezia kuttaka eririko klezia ya Mapeera.
Kumukolo guno gwegumu, Ssabasumba Paulo Ssemogerere y’atongozza kaweefube w’okusonda ensimbi z’okuzimba mu kifo kino klezia empya, era ey’omulembe.
Obukadde bw’ensimbi za Uganda 11 bwebwasondeddwa mu buliwo nemubisuubizo. Abamu ku baasonze kwabaddeko minista omubeezi ow’ebyenjigiriza ebyawagulu, Dr. John Chrysostom Muyingo, Ssentebe wa Gombolola y’e Lubaga Zacchy Mberaze, omubaka omulonde owa Lubaga South Hon. Eugenia Nassolo, n’abalala bangi.
Ssaabasumba Paul Ssemogerere ng'ayogera
Obabaka b’Ekisiibo
Ssabasumba Paulo Ssemogerere y’asinzidde kumukolo guno n’asaba Abakristu n’Abasiraamu okweyambiza obudde bw’Ekisiibo bonna bwebalimu, okutereeza enkolagana yaabwe ke Katonda, n’okunyweza empisa ennungi ey’okwagalana, okusosonyiwagana, n’okutabagana nebannaabwe.
Yagambye nti oluvannyuma lwebyaliwo mukulonda, ebyaviiramu abantu bangi okulumizibwa, okusibibwa mu makomera, ate n’abamu okuttibwa, ky’abadde kissaanye era nga nokuteekwa kiteekwa Bannauganda okwekuba mukifuba, bawulirize era bakole Katonda ky’abagamba okukola, ate era ggwe wamma batabagane, eggwanga liddemu okuitambula obulungi

title: Poliisi eggalidde abantu 430
content:
POLIISI eyongedde amaanyi mu bikwekweto okufuuza abateeberezebwa okuba abamenyi b’amateeka mu kaweefube waayo ow’okutebenkeza ebitundu.

Mu bikwekweto ebyakoleddwa poliisi ez'enjawulo mu Kampala n’emiriraano ku Lwokubiri ekiro ne ku Lwokusatu emisana, abantu 436 be baakwatiddwa ne baggalirwa.

Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala n’emiriraano, Racheal Kawala yagambye nti, okukola ebikwekweto bino kigendereddwaamu okulwanyisa obubinja bw’abamenyi b’amateeka obususse okutigomya abantu.

Yagambye nti ku Lwokusatu emisana, poliisi ya CPS yakoze ekikwekweto ku kibangirizi ky’eggaali y’omukka, ku bitaala bya Jinja Road, awaali ofiisi z’akakiiko k’ebyokulonda ne ku nkulungo ya Mukwano n’ebibangirizi ebirala mwe baakwatidde abateeberezebwa okwenyigira mu bubbi.

Yategeezezza nti okukola ekikweketo kino, poliisi yakizudde ng’abamu ku bamenyi b’amateeka bwe beebaka mu bibangirizi oluvannyuma lw’okutigomya abantu era baakutte 55.

Yagambye nti, mu bikwekweto ebirala ebyakoleddwa poliisi y’e Kira e Mulawa, Najjeera, Kamwanyi baakutte 81, poliisi ya Kira Road yakutte abantu 49 okuva e Kamwokya, Kisaasi ne Kyebando.

Poliisi ya Old Kampala mu Kisenyi yakutteyo abantu 152 ate eya Jinja Road yakutte 20, ey’e Nansana yakutte 48 ne poliisi e Wakiso yakutte 23 n’abalala abaakwatiddwa poliisi endala

title: Sipiika Nkuggwa alidde eky'obwassentebbe wa Basipiika mu Bug
content:
Patrick Mukisa Nkugwa ng’ono kansala w’e Manyangwa ate nga ye sipiika wa Kasangati town council amezze banne bwe babadde mu lwokaano lw’okuvuganya kw’ani akulira Basipiika abeegattira mu kibiina kyabwe ekya Central Region Urban Council Speaker's Association nga okuvuganya okwamaanyi kubadde wakati we sipiika wa Goma division e Mukono, Tonny Bwanika.
Gye buvuddeko Basipiika ba tawuni kanso ez’enjawulo bavaayo ne beekolamu ebibiina ebibagatta mu masekatti ga Uganda omuli; Greater Masaka, Greater Luweero, Greater Mukono, Greater Wakiso-Kampala, Greater Mubende.

title: Kusasira yeepikira Bobi Wine mu lutalo lw'okuyimba, abayimbi
content:
Omuyimbi wa bbandi era omuwagizi wa Pulezidenti Museveni, Catherine Kusasira ategeezezza nti mwetegefu okwenyigira mu lutalo lw’omuziki n'omuntu omu yekka mu bayimbi b'omu Uganda. Omuntu ono ye Bobi Wine.
Bino Kusasira yabyogeredde mu yintaviyu ku ttivvi emu n'agamba nti battle tasobola kugiwa muyimbi mulala okuggyako pulezidenti wa NUP Robert Kyagulanyi Ssentamu.
"Siyinza kwenyigira mu lutalo na muyimbi mulala yenna Munnayuganda okuggyako Bobi Wine. Oyo yekka gwe nandyagadde okunyigira naye mu lutalo lw'okuyimba, " Kusasira bwe yagambye.
Kusasira okwogera bw'ati kiddiridde muyimbi munne owa bbandi Maureen Nantume okuvaayo wiiki ewedde n'alaga nti amwepikira mu 'battle' y'okuyimba kuba sitayiro y'omuziki gwe bakuba y'emu.

title: Nampijja acanze abakulu mu poliisi n'abambuza ennyonta
content:
Mwana muwala Florence Nampijja azaalidde abaserikale ebitukula, bw’abacanze n’abambuza n’ennyonta.
Bino byabadde mu muzannyo ku Bat Valley Theater ng’olwo kafulu w’okuzannya
emizannyo gya siteegi, Male Musa ajaguza okuweza emizannyo 75.
Male Ne Nampijja Ku Siteegi
Kyana kiwala ki Nampijja mu gumu ku mizannyo egy’azannyiddwa ogwatuumiddwa Love Tear Ezigga ly’ente, yacanze b’afande ba poliisi okwabadde Male Musa ne Zamunyo bwe yabalaze omukwano ne gubamalamu okukkakkana nga poliisi bazifudde za kunyumirirwamu laavu era bakama baabwe ne babambula amayinja.
Abalala abaacamudde ennyo abantu be bakazannyirizi Maulana ne Reign, abaabadde bazannya nga bakulutu ba poliisi ne basesa abantu okujula okubaabya emitwe. Abayimbi; Harriet Ssanyu ne Shillah Nabasumba nabo basanyusizza abantu.

title: Ebifaananyi 4 ku kiri e Nakaseke gye bagenda okuziika mutaba
content:
EMBEERA ya kiyongobero wano mu maka awagenda okuziikibwa mutabani wa Hajji Nadduli, Sulaiman Jakana Nadduli ku kyalo Kaddunda mu muluka gw’e Kaddunda e Kapeeka mu disitulikiti y’e Nakaseke.
Abasima entaana omugenda okuziikibwa omugenzi Jakana Sulaiman Nadduli.
Mu kiseera kino entaana omunaawumuzzibwa omubiri gw'omugenzi esimibwa ate ng'Abasiramu bwe basoma ennyiriri ez'enjawulo.
Jakana afudde ekiro ekikeesezza olunaku lwa leero era waakuziikibwa ku ssaawa 10:00 ez'olweggulo.
Abakungubazi baatuuse dda.
Abamu ku bannaddiini baatuuse dda awagenda okuziikibwa omugenzi.
Abakungubazi mu tenti.

title: Omuyimbi Rabadaba olukoze Video ya Ffe banene ne yerangirira mu bayimbi abanene mu nsi yonna
content:
Bya Musasi waffe

Omuyimbi Rabadaba ( Faisal Sseguya),olumaze okukwata vidiyo y’oluyimba lweyatuumye ffe banene n'awaga nti Kati ayingidde mu ttuluba ly'abanene munsi yonna .

title: Omulamuzi avudde mu gwa Paasita Male ne Mabiriizi
content:
Bya Alice Namutebi
OMULAMUZI wa Kkooti Enkulu e Mukono, Christine Kaahwa agaanye okuwulira omusango gwa looya Male Mabiriizi, Pr. Solmon Male gwe yateekayo ng’ajulira ku by’okubakebera DNA.
Fayiro yali eweereddwa Omulamuzi Kaahwa kyokka eggulo yagivuddemu nga tawadde nsonga yonna. Yagisindise ew’omuwandiisi wa kkooti balonde omulamuzi omulala awulire omusango guno.
Fayiro eno kati yaweereddwa Omulamuzi David Matovu akulira Kkooti Enkulu e Mukono.
Dna Test
Nga balinda okuwulira okujulira kwa Paasita Male, ate Mabiriizi yataddeyo naye okujulira ng’agamba nti Omulamuzi wa kkooti eya wansi Paul Matyama yakola nsobi okugaana okuziikula omulambo gwa kitaabwe Hajji Mohammed Bazinduuse Lulibedda Mutumba kwe baba babakeberera DNA.
MabirIizi ye yaloopa omusango era eky'okugenda ku DNA akiwagira naye agamba nti kirina kukolebwa ku kitaabwe Mutumba bamuggyeko akagumba kwe baba basinziira.
Paasita Male ekya DNA akiwakanya ng’awa ensonga nti ekiraamo ky'omugenzi weekiri tekyogera ku Mabiriizi ate omugenzi yababuulira nti Mabirizi si y’amuzaala.
Olutalo lwa Mabirizi ne Male lwatandika baganda be bwe bagoba Mabiriizi ewa kitaawe e Wakaliga Lubaga nga bagamba nti si mwana wa kitaabwe.
Mabiriizi yabaloopa mu kkooti ng’ agamba nti batyoboola eddembe lye ery'okubaako famire n'obuwangwa mw’agwa n’asaba kkooti eragire bonna abeeyita abaana b'omugenzi bagende ku DNA amazima gaveeyo.
Male ne baganda be abalala abaayabya olumbe lwa kitaabwe buli omu n’afuna omugabo naye kkooti byonna yabisazaamu

title: Ekitongole ekivunaanyizibwa ku bisolo kyagala obuwumbi 10
content:
EKITONGOLE ekivunaanyizibwa ku bisolo by’omu nsiko mu ggwanga kisabye Palamenti obuwumbi kkumi mu mwaka gw’ebyensimbi ogujja okugula ennyonyi eneekozesebwa okulawuna amakuumiro g’ebisolo.
Okusaba kuno kwakoleddwa kaminsona w’ebyobulambuzi, Dorcus Rukundo Twesigomwe mu nsisinkano ye n’ababaka ku kakiiko akalondoola ebyamaguzi n’obulambuzi.
Yagambye nti, ennyonyi ejja kutaasa ensolo ku bayizzi abazitigomya. Agamba nti ejja kulawuna amakuumiro okuli Queen Elizabeth National Park, Murchison Falls, n’amalala nga yaakutambuliramu n’abasawo abajjanjaba ensolo zino.
Agattako nti, abayizzi bagufudde mugano okuyigga enjovu nga bwe balemererwa waakiri baleka bazitaddeko obuvune. Yagambye nti ennyonyi eno, ejja kubanguyiza omulimu gw’okubala ebisolo ogukolebwa buli mwaka mu makuumiro ag’enjawulo.
Minisita omubeezi ow’ebyobulambuzi, Martin Mugarra Bahinduka yategeezezza nti eggwanga lyetaaga ennyonyi eno kubanga ekitongole kikooye okwesigama ku ggye lya UPDF.
Yawadde ekyokulabirako nti, amawanga amalala agalina amakuumiro g’ebisolo, galina ennyonyi ezirawuna ne bamanya wonna awaba wagudde akabi.
Ababaka ku kakiiko kano okwabadde David Kalwanga (Busujju), Richard Gafabusa (Bwamba) n’abalala beewuunyizza ne babuuza nti, emyaka gy’ebyensimbi musanvu egiyise ekitongole kino kizze kisaba ssente z’ennyonnyi nga zikiweebwa naye tebamanyi kiddirira

title: "Amooti, ekituufu by’oyogera bitusanyusizza naye naffe ‘ekon
content:
“Kazannyirizi Amooti Omubalanguzi ye yabadde kalabaalaba mu kivvulu ekyatuumiddwa ‘Tugende mu kikadde’ ekyabadde ku Serena Hotel ku wiikendi.
Nga bulijjo, yakoze obubadi bwe obwacamudde abantu era bwe yalengedde abanene nga bafa enseko n’ava ku siteegi n’agenda ng’abayitamu.
Amooti ng'ali ne minisita Kyambadde ssaako Sam Bagenda owa Ebonies.
Ako kakodyo k’aba MC n’abayimbi okunoonya ssente mu bivvulu. Kyokka wadde abadigize baasasudde buwanana okuyingira, (150,000/-) ez’okufuuwa abayimbi ne MC zirabika tezaabaddemu nga balinga nabo abeekwasa ‘Economy’ soma ‘ekonome’ okubanyiga.
Era musajjawattu Amooti yakanze kwererejjera mu maaso g’eyali Minisita Ameria Kyambadde ne Dr. Bbosa owa Ebonies nga kwatadde n’okubawaana kyokka nga tebavaayo gye bali.
Owoolugambo waffe atugambye nti wadde abategesi b’ekivvulu baayodde, abamu ku bayimbi baawuliddwa nga beeyogeza nti ekivvulu kyabasaze ndowooza olw’abadigize obutabafuuwa. Oba tebaategedde nti kino ekivvulu ky’abakungu? Nze naawe.
Era n’abamu ku badigize nti nabo ezo ssente ze baabasabye beekudde nneekuule bawummuze ku birowoozo n’okwemalako situleesi nga tebasobola kwongerako z’akufuuwa bayimbi ne MC.
Abamu ku bayimbi abaasanyusizza abantu abantu kwabaddeko: Chane Nalubega, Kabuye Ssemboga, Lady Mariam Tinatine, Abdul Mulaasi, Ziggy Dee, Betty Mpologoma ne Eddy Yawe.

title: Eddwaaliro lya Mulago bakuzizza olunaku lw’abaana abalina ko
content:
ABAZADDE bakubiriziddwa okukomya okweraguza ng’abaana baabwe balwadde obulwadde bwe batategeera, wabula babadduse mu malwaliro basobole okujjanjabibwa nga bukyali kubanga emikisa gy’okuwona gibaawo.
Omusawo w’abaana omukugu mu kujjanjaba endwadde z’omusaayi ne kookolo, era akulira ekitongole ekigatta abasawo abajjanjaba abaana mu Uganda Anne Akullo, yasiimye abazadde abayimiridde n’abaana baabwe okulwanyisa kookolo ow’enjawulo gwe balina era n’abasuubiza nti, nabo bajja kutuuka ku buwanguzi nga abalala bwe bazze bawangulaYasiimye ebitongole eby’enjawulo bwe bakwatagana okubayambako okujjanjaba abaana bano omuli; Oncopharm ababawa eddagala, Uhuru Restaurant abaabawanga emmere okuliisa abaana n’ebirala.
Nga February 15, buli mwaka Uganda yeegatta ku nsi yonna okujjukira olunaku lwa kookolo mu baana nga lujaguzibwa olw’abaana abajjanjabibwa kookolo n’okumulwanyisa mu baana, ssaako okuyimirira awamu ne ffamire ezirina abaana abalina kookoloKu Lwokutaano lwa wiiki ewedde, eddwaaliro lya Mulago National Refferral Hospital lyategeka omukolo gw’okujaguza abaana abo abawangaala ne kookolo ku waadi yaabwe okwongera okubawa essuubi nti, ddala kisoboka okulwana ne bawangula obulwadde buno nga abalala bangi bwe balwanye ne bamuwangula. Baabategekedde ekijjulo, keeki n’okusanyusibwa.
Ku mukolo guno Kennedy Baggi yawadde obujulizi bw’okuwona kookolo w’omusaayi bwe yatandika okufuna obubonero omuli; okuzimba ekifuba, okukolola okutawona, okukaluubirizibwa okussa n’okutuuyana ekiro mu mwaka gwa 2021, wabula yajjanjabwa mangu mu 2024

title: ABANTU abawera Mukaaga, be bakwatiddwa mu Greater Bushenyi n
content:
ABANTU abawera Mukaaga, be bakwatiddwa mu Greater Bushenyi ne Ishaka, ku misango gy'okubbisa emmundu, okweyambisa ebijambiya n'okutta ente ezisoba mu 50 mu mwezi oguwedde.
Emisango gy'okubbisa eryanyi , emisango 12 gyaloopebwa nga muno mulimu egy'okubbisa emmundu mukaaga , n'okubbisa ebijambiya , amayinja n'emiggo nagyo gyali Mukaaga.
Abamu ku baakwatibwa, kuliko Ramanthan Kankiriho ngabadde yeyita Samuel, eyagibwa e Katooma cell ku misango esatu, n'abalala okuli Ramanthan Sekajja amanyiddwa nga Kyojo , Eriad Byampiika amanyiddwa nga Boize wamu ne Rashid Basajja.
Omwogezi wa poliisi mu kitundu kino, Apollo Tayebwa, ategeezezza nti okuva abantu bano lwe bakwatibwa, emisango gy'okubbisa emmundu, gyakendeerera ddala.
Agasseeko nti era baakwata Gordon Turyasingura ne Damalie Nuwagaba omukozi mu woteeri ku byekuusa ku kutemaatema ente z'abatuuze 53 ne bazitta n'okuzitusaako ebisago.
Asabye abantu okwongera okukolaganira awamu ne poliisi mu kulwanyisa obumenyi bw'amateeka mu kitundu n'agattako nti bano baatwaliddwa mu kkooti okuwerennemba n'emisang

title: Akatale k’ebikajjo kasattiza ab’e Namayingo
content:
ABALIMI b’ebikajjo e Namayingo ge bakaaba ge bakomba olw’okubulwa agula ebikajjo byabwe ebituuse okukamulwamu ssukaali.

Obuzibu bwavudde ku bannakigwanyizi abaalemesezza ekkolero lya ssukaali eppya erya CN Sugar Factory okufuna layisinsi erikkiriza okukamula ssukaali. W’osomera bino ng’okuzimba ekkolero lino kwayimirizibwa dda!

Abalimi baasinzidde mu lukiiko lwabwe e Kifuyo mu disitulikiti y’e Namayingo ku Lwokutaano ne bategeeza nti baakola endagaano n’ekkolero lya CN Sugar emyaka ebiri emabega okuliguza ebikajjo byabwe. Kati tebakkirizibwa kubiguza kkolero ddala.

Baagambye nti, bannaabwe beewola mu bbanka, okutegeka ennimiro zaabwe n’okupangisa we balimira ebikajjo kyokka bituuse okukungulwa nga tebasobola kubitunda. Ebimu bitandise okukalira mu ssamba ate ebirala bikumwako omuliro abantu abatannamanyika.

Ne bagattako nti, bbanka zitandise okubabanja nga bwe zitiisa okutwala ebintu byabwe omuli ettaka n’amayumba.

Olukiiko lwetabiddwaamu ne RDC w’e Namayingo, Eva Kwesiga eyasuubizza okukola ekiwandiiko nnamutaayiika asengeke ensonga z’abalimi akitwalire Katikkiro wa Uganda, Robinah Nabbanja abasalire amagezi. Kwesiga yagambye nti, ensonga zino ziri mu maaso g’akakiiko ka National Sugar Council nga zitunulwamu era essaawa yonna akakiiko kaakulaga okusalawo kwako.

Kinajjukirwa nti, omumyuka wa Katikkiro wa Uganda owookusatu, Rukia Isanga Nakadama yakiikirira omumyuka wa Pulezidenti, Jessica Alupo nga August 9, 2024 okutema evvuunike ku kyalo Kifuyo mu ggombolola y’e Buyinja mu disitulikiti y’e Namayingo okutandika okuzimba ekkolero lya CN Sugar Limited.

title: Endongo ya Kenzo aba Collins e Mukono bakyagyasimula bugolo!
content:
Kenzo yagambye nti kyali kizibu okukkirizisa omutegesi okukyusa ekivvulu kino okukijja ku nnusu omutwalo ogumu gwe babaddenga basaba abantu ebbanga lyonna okudda ku mitwalo ebiri.
“Omutegesi yalina okutya nti ssinga tukiteeka ku mitwalo ebiri kiyinza okubeera ekizibu abawagizi okukittanira. Wabula nsi musanyufu kuba muzze mu bungi,” bwe yagambye.
Yategeezezza nti buli kimu mu kiseera kino kiri ku buseere omuli ensimbi ezipangisa ekifo, ebyuma n’abakozi, ensimbi eziranga ebivvulu n’ebirala nga kizibu okusigala ku ssente enkadde n’omalako mu kiseera kino eky’embeera y’eby’enfuna eyeekanamye.
Kenzo yalinnye ku siteegi ku ssaawa mukaaga ogw’ekiro mu ttumbi n’annyuka ku ssaawa munaana ng’ayimbye ennyimba ezisoba mu makumi abiri okuli empya n’enkadde era yalese abawagizi tebatoma.
Ekivvulu kino era kyetabiddwako abayimbi okuli Sewa Sewa, Christopher Panda, bakazannyirizi okuli Kalera, Madrat ne Chiko ssako Bobi Brown ne Nilo Nilo.

title: "Ngenda kusasulira abayizi ba yunivaasite ebisale nga munnon
content:
Munna Conservative Party, Joseph Elton Mabirizi asinzidde ku lukung'aana lw'akubye e Kikuube, mu ggombolola y'e Buhimba n'asuubiza abalonzi okusasulira abayizi ba yunivaasite ebisale bya bitundu 60 ku 100, ku ssente ze balina okuwa nga basoma.
Mabiriizi ng'akakasa abalonzi be bwe yabadde ayogera.
Ategeezezza nti abazadde bayita mu bugubi okufuna ensimbi zino kubanga zibeera nnyingi ddala ne kivaako abasinga okutuula awaka ne batasoma olw'ebisale.
Mmotoka eyamuleese ssaako omuserikale omu ku bamuwa obukuumi.
Abawagizi be bamukooneddemu bw'ayongedde okubakakasa nga bw'agenda n'okutumbula ebyobulimi nga babawa ttulakita n'ebyuma ebyanguyaako emirimu gyabwe basobole okufuna ssente ezeegasa n'okugatta omutindo ku birime byabwe.

title: Bakutte abantu 5 abatalina lukusa kutwala bantu bweru
content:
Poliisi mu Kampala ng'eri n'abakungu ba minisitule y'abakozi n'ekikula ky'abantu, bakoze ekikwekweto ne bakwata abantu 5 abatalina lukusa lutwala bantu bweru.

Kigambibwa nti bano baatondawo amakampuni agatwala abantu ebweru nga tebalina lukusa na layisinsi ebakkiriza kukola mulimu ogwo.

Wabaddewo okwemulugunya okuzze kukolebwa mwe baferera abantu ssente nyingi nga babalimba okubafunira emirimu ebweru n'abalala ne balemera pasipooti z'abantu.

Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala, Racheal Kawala, agambye nti abantu babakwatidde mu kkampuni okuli eya Hussinah Travels Ltd, Hasaya Recruitment company Ltd, ne Big dreams visa Experts tours and travels Ltd. Ayongeddeko nti okunoonyereza kugenda mu maaso.

title: King Saha amazaalibwa agakulizza mu bakateyamba
content:
OMUYIMBI King Saha afaayo ku bali mu bwetaavu.
Bwe yabadde akuza amazaalibwa ge ag’emyaka 36, yagenze mu kifo kya Bakateeyamba e Nalukolongo n’abudaabuda abakadde, abaliko obulemu nga bano batambulira mu bugaali era yabatonedde ebintu omwabadde ssukaali, omuceere, ssabbuuni ayoza n’okulongoosa, ppampa ezisibwa abakadde n’ez’abaana n’ebirala.
Kng Saha N'omwami Atambulira Ku Kagaali 1212
Omuyimbi yabadde ne ttiimu ye eya ‘Team Saha The Top King’ ng’enteekateeka yawomeddwaamu omutwe ssentebe waabwe, AlmaKing.
Ababiikira abalabirira bakateyamba baasiimye King Saha ne ttiiimu ye olw’obuyambi buno ne basaba abayimbi abalala okumulabirako.

title: Minisita Persis Namuganza alangiridde okuvuganya ku kifo kya
content:
MINISITA omubeezi ow’ettaka n’amayumba era omubaka omukyala akiikirira Namutumba mu Palamenti, Persis Namuganza alangiridde nga bw’agenda okuvuganya ku kifo ky’obwa sipiika bwa palamenti nga Talina kibiina mw’ajidde.
Minidita Persis Namuganza ng'ayanjula enteekateeka ze eri bannamawulire
Bino Namuganza abyogedde bw’abadde mu lukungaana lwa bannmawulire ku wofiisi ye mu Kampala mw’ategeerezza nti yesowoddeyo okuvuganya ku kifo kino olw’ensonga ezitali zimu nga muno mwemuli n’okuba nti palamenti ey’omulundi oguyise eswazizza nnyo abantu abaabalonda.
Anokoddeyo entalo ez’olutatadde ezizze zeyolekera mu palamenti eno nga kino kisiize ekifaananyi ekibi eri eggwanga n’ebweru walyo.
Minisita Namuganza ng'annyonnyola
Ayongeddeko nti mu kiseera kino yakafuna ababaka 150 abesowoddeyo okubeera emabega we era nga bano bamukakasizza nti bagenda kwongera okumufunira n’abalala babegatteko asobole okutuuka ku buwanguzi ku kifo kino.
Asabye bannansi okumuteekamu obwesige atuukirize ekirooto kye naddala nga amalawo omize omuli obulyake, obuli bw’enguzi n’ebirala.
Yemulugunyizza ku bamu ku bakulembeze banne abali mu buyinza aboolesa emize ekikyamu n’ategeeza nti bano balina okweddako.

Wabaddewo okwemulugunya okuzze kukolebwa mwe baferera abantu ssente nyingi nga babalimba okubafunira emirimu ebweru n'abalala ne balemera pasipoota z'abantu.

title: Gloria Buggie awangudde awaadi
content:
GLORIA Buggie omwaka agumazeeko mu maanyi. Yawangudde engule y’omuyimbi omukyala asinze mu mawanga agali mu bukiikaddyo ne mu buvanjuba bwa Afrika mu mpaka za ‘Zikomo Africa Awards’ ezaabadde e Tanzania.
Buggie olwawangudde n’awaga era n’alabula abayimbi abanene nti ate ky’areeta omwaka ogujja kisingako wano.
Omanyi Gloria Buggie ono abamu bamumanyi ng’omwolesi w’omubiri okusinga okuyimba era omukolo guno bwe gwawedde yalabiddwaako n’omuyimbi Rayvanny okuva e Tanzania nga bali bulala.
Obutambi nga Buggie ali mu nnyumba y’omuyimbi ono bw’asaasaanye ku mutimbagano gya yintanenti era abangu b’okusala ‘waadi’ ne batandika.

title: Abagagga b'e Mutungo balagiddwa okulaga engeri gye baafunamu ebibanja ku ttaka ly’abatuuze
content:
KKOOTI eragidde abagagga abagambibwa okwesenza ku bibanja ebyawambibwa ku batuuze b’e Mutungo, okugyeyanjulira balage engeri gye baabifunamu.

Poliisi y’ebyettaka e Makindye ng’ekulembeddwaamu Isack Hatangimana akola ku musango guno ng’eri wamu ne poliisi y’e Kajjansi ne Katwe, baagenze bukubirire ku ttaka erisangibwa mu zooni ya Kakoola e Mutungo, okuteekesa ekiragiro ky’omuwaabi wa Gavumenti mu nkola, okulagira abaliriko okukola sitatimenti okulaga engeri gye baafunamu ebibanja ebyo.

Kiddiridde Kkooti Enkulu, okuyita abagagga abaasenga ku ttaka lino mu kkooti beewozeeko ku bigambbwa nti, baalisengako mu bukyamu. Abatuuze baabasengula ku kifuba, bwe baategeera ku nteekateeka y’okuzimba oluguudo lwa Munyonyo-Express oluyita mu kitundu kino.

Abagagga bano bassaayo okwewozaako kwabwe mu kkooti, naye baagaana okweyanjula ate ne bagenda mu maaso n’okuzimba, ekyawalirizza omuwaabi wa Gavumenti okulagira bakwatibwe. Poliisi yagenze ku ttaka naye teri mugagga yasangiddwaawo era abakozi abasukka mu 5 be baakwatiddwa bayambeko poliisi mu kutegeera bannannyini bizimbe bye bakolako.

Abatuuze bagamba nti ebibanja byabawambibwako na maanyi omwali; okwonoona amayumbagaabwe n’ebirime. Baagala bayambibwe bafune obwenkanya kuba okuva 2013 lwe baagenda mu kkooti, ebibanja byabwe tebibaddizibwanga.

Enkaayana ku ttaka lino zaatandika mu 2013 mu kukola oluguudo lwa Munyonyo Express, abagambibwa okuba babbulooka bwe baawamba ebibanja by’abantu ebigambibwa nti biwerako yiika 28 ku Block 273, ne babamenyera amayumba n’okwonoona ebirime era ne babagobawo.

Baddukira mu kkooti era emisango egyasooka okwali ogwa Dr. William Nganwa eyasooka okukaayanira ebibanja byabwe ne gugobwa n’ekyapa kye nekisazibwamu n’alagirwa okuliyirira abatuuze kyokka ate abaali beesenzezza mu bibanja byabwe tebaalagirwa kuvaamu.

Omulala yali Jackson Ajuna ng’omusango yaguggyayo mu kkooti n’asaba abatuuze bateese, kye baagaana nga bagamba tebamumanyi. Abagambibwa okuba babbulooka baagenda mu maaso n’okuguza abagagga abalala ebibanja bino.

Abagambibwa okuba nti be baali bannannyini ttaka eryo abasoba mu 100 bagamba nti bali mu mbeera mbi.

OMU KU BANNANNYINI

BIBANJA AYOGEDDE

Siraje Muyanja, omu ku batuuze agamba nti, babbulooka bajja ne babakolako effujjo ne babatBukeddewalako ebibanja byabwe ku mpaka olw’okuba baali baategedde ku pulojekiti y’oluguudo lwa Munyonyo-Express olwali lugenda okuzimbibwa.

Bassaayo omusango oguvunaana bonna abali ku bibanja byabwe nabo ne bassaayo okwewozaako kwabwe naye baagaana okujja mu kkooti ate ne bagenda mu maaso n’okuzimba. Mu kkooti waliyo ffayiro bbiri; eya civil ne criminal era balinze ekiddirira okuva ku kikwekweto kino. Eyali nnannyini ttaka erikaayanirwa, Daison Musisi agamba nti, ye yaguza abatuuze era waakutambula nabo okutuusa nga bafunye obwenkanya.

title: Olukiiko olufuga ettaka mu Kampala lulayiziddwa Lukwago n'al
content:
OLUKIIKO olupya olufuga ettaka mu Kampala lulayiziddwa Loodi Mmeeya Erias Lukwago n’alabula abalondeddwa nti tebageza ne bakwata ku ttaka ly’amasomero ga Gavumenti oba amalwaliro.
Yabalagidde nti bayambeko nnyo ku bantu abalina emivuyo gy’ettaka lya liizi okubalwanirira n’ategeeza nti ekibuga kiteekwa okufuna ku buweerero ng’abantu bali bulungi n’ebyobugagga byaabwe.
Olukiiko olulayidde lukulirwa munnamateeka Joseph Anguria, nga lutuulako Ruth Kijjambu, Muky. Josephine Muwonge, muganda wa Hassan Basajjabalaba ayitibwa Hajji Erias Ntale, Hussein Kato , Haruna Ssebaggala ne Jimex Mujuni.
Omulamuzi wa kkooti etuula ku KCCA, Edger Kakaire ye yalulayizza eggulo ku City Hall .
Ssentebe w’olukiiko era munnamateeka Joseph Anguria ye yasoose okukuba ebirayiro n'ategeeza nti baasomye amateeka agafuga ettaka mu ggwanga ne bageetegereza era bagenda kwewala ebizze bisuula ababaddewo mu butego.

title: Ssanyu : MC Maswanku ammalako situleesi
content:
OMULUNGI nsaba kukubuuzaako ku kkubo eridda mu Nyendo?

Kwata liri erya koolaasi.

Omukyala ow’ekisa gwe njogera naye, y’ani erinnya?

Nze Sabrina Sylvia

Beddira ki abo?

N’ery’ekika olyagala?

Anti Kabaka yatulagidde tusoosowaze emiziro gyaffe.

Ky’oba omanya neddira Ngeye.

Muno mu Masaka mw’obeera oba oli mugenyi nga nze ?

Mwe mbeera era mwe nzaalwa.

Okoleramu mulimu?

Mpereeza byamizannyo ku leediyo emu.

Nange gye mpangaalira eyo ku Bukedde, mmanyiyo bangi abava eno.

Obwedda njogera na wa Bukedde nga simanyi! Nsanyuse okukulaba

Nange nsanyuse okukusanga.

Kati bwe naaba nzizeeyo ku Bukedde, nkulabireyo ani?

Ndabira nnyo MC Maswanku, Katayira wa Bukedde, by’akola binkolera.

Mmugambe ki ekirala?

Nti twegweko mu kivvulu kye ekya The Best of MC Maswanku ku Muzindaalo ku Lwomukaaga.

Naye abaana b’e Masaka temutudde?

Twatondebwa kulumya balala mitwe anti.

Ng’oggyeeko ebyemizannyo biki ebirala ebisinga okukunyumira?

Endongo y’abaana b’eka; Ssuuna Ben ne Mbaziira Tonny ey’ebinyaanyanyaanya gye batabula enkolera era y’ensonga endala lwaki ngenda kubasalako mu bitiibwa ewa Maswanku.

Nze ekigenda okundeeta kuddamu kukulabako tuwayeemu?

Era okeerako kuba nze ngenda okwaniriza abagenyi ate ggwe nja kukuwaamu

ka ‘hug’ ak’ensusso.

Ye ng’oyogeza kiraavulaavu oli mu mukwano?

Nedda siguliimu, empewo y’enkozesa ebyo.

Kati ogw’okukubugumya gumpeere ddala lumu ngukole?

Bya siriyaasi omponye obw’omu!!

Byakulya ki ebisinga okukuwoomera bye mba nkuleetera lwe

tunaddamu okusisinkana?

Akammonde n’enkonko binkolera.

Kagambo ki akasembayo k’osuula Bannamasaka?

Omwana wa Bukedde, MC Maswanku azze n’ettu erinaatumalako situleesi ku Lwomukaaga e Buloba.

title: Kaliisoliiso wa Gav't alangiridde ebikwekweto ku bali b'engz
content:
Bya Frank Ssentongo
KALIISOLIISO wa Gavumenti ayanjudde enteekateeka y'ebikwekweto okulondoola eby’obugaga by’abakozi ba gavumenti mu mirimu egyenjawulo okusingiraddala abo abatanewandiisa mu mwezi gwa April 1st mpaka nga 30th.
“Ngatuyambibwako aba Police n’ebitongole ebirala; wofiisi ya kaliisoliiso wa gavumenti tugenda kukola ekikwekweto bino okwetolola eggwanga lyonna.
Minisita aweze okusimba mu mbuga z’amateeka omuntu yenna anasangibwa nga yakozesa bubi ensimbi z’omuwi w’omusolo okwekussa.. Asabye abakozi ba gavumenti mu office ez’enjawulo okwetanira ekikwekweto kino; Okusingira ddala abo abatenewandiisa.

title: Gloria Bugie amazaalibwa ge ag'emyaka 20 agajagulizza mu Ghe
content:
Omuyimbi Gloria Bugie adduukiridde abantu b’omu Ghetto bw'abadde ajaguza amazaalibwa ge.
Ku Ssande, Bugie eyayimba “Nyash” yajaguza amazaalibwa ge ag’emyaka 20 era ng’okujjaguza yakututte Nalukolongo mu Ghetto.
Gloria Bugie Ng'awa Omwana Ebitabo.
Eno abantu baayo yabatwalidde ebintu omwabadde ebitabo bya baana abagenda ku ssomero n’ekkalaamu, emigaati, ssabbuuni, ssukaali n’ebirala ebikozesebwa awaka okubayambako mu kutambuza obulamu.
Yategeezezza nti kino azze akikola wabula nga takiteeka mu kkamera ng’ekyamuletedde okubissa bino mu kkamera kwe kwagala okusikiriza abantu abalala abalina obusobozi okuyamba abantu abatali bulungi.
Yagambye nti ayagala okwongera okutumbula ekitone kye eky’okuyimba afube okulaba ng’akiikirira Uganda ku mutendera gw’ensi yonna ekintu ekibadde kikyalemye abayimbi abamu.

title: Obutasoma buluma bukulu! Catherine Kusaasira azzeeyo ku ssomero....
content:
Ono yeegasse ku Nkumba University okusoma ddiguli mu bya bizinensi eya Bachelor of Arts in International Relations and Diplomacy.

Ku Lwomukaaga lwa wiiki ewedde Kusaasira lwe yeesozze ekibiina omulundi gwe ogusooka era olwavudde mu kibiina n'agenda ku mukutu gwe ogwa Facebook n'agabana amawulire g'okuddayo ku ssomero ne mikwano gye ng'agamba nti yalabye nga kisaanidde omuntu okuba n'ebitabo era kye kyamuwalirizza okuddayo ku ssomero.

Kusaasira ng'ali ku ssomero

Kusaasira omuwabuzi wa Pulezidenti Museveni ku nsonga za Kampala, yagambye nti yeebaza Katonda olw'olugendo lw'atandiseeko era asaba Katonda amuyambe alumalirize bulungi.

Bbo abawagizi be obwedda bawoza kimu, " Kusaasira weebale kusalawo, singa byonna bigenda bulungi n'otikkirwa osobola n'okufuuka munnabyabufuzi era omubaka wa Palamenti".

Kinnajukkirwa nti Kusaasira ssi ye muyimbi asoose okuvaayo n'addayo ku ssomero, banne okuli; Bobi Wine ( Pulezidenti wa NUP), Goeffrey Lutaaya, Ronald Mayinja, Jose Chameleon baddayo ne bongera ku bitabo.

Kusaasira tukwagaliza buwanguzi....

title: Omulamuzi awadde ebiragiro ku DNA ya Pasita Male ne Mabiriizi
content:
Bya Alice Namutebi

KKOOTI Enkulu e Mukono ewadde pasita Solomon Male ne looya Hassan Male Mabiriizi ebiragiro ebipya kw’egenda okusinziira ng’esala omusango gw’okujulira okubakebera endagabutonde (DNA).

Omulamuzi David Matovu abalagidde nti obujulizi bwonna abwetaaga ku fayiro y’omusango obutasukka nga September 5, 2023 olwo abawe ensala nga October 5, 2023 mu kujulira okw’emirundi ebiri kwe baateekayo.

Pasita Male yatya okukeberwa DNA abooluganda bonna 17 nga looya Mabiriizi bwe yasaba okuzuula oba nga balina oluganda lw’omusaayi ne Male Mabiriizi.

Alumiriza nti kitaawe, omugenzi Hajji Muhammad Bazinduse Lulibedda Mutumba eyabeeranga e Wakaliga-Lubaga si ye yali azaala Mabiriizi nga kino kyeyoleka mu

kiraamo kye kubanga teyamuteeka mu baana b’azaala.

Male agamba nti tewali bujulizi businga kiraamo ky’omugenzi era okubatwala ku DNA ku mpaka kuba kulinnyirira ddembe lyabwe kubanga bo bantu bakulu abeesalirawo.

Mabiriizi yaloopa baganda be mu kkooti ng’agamba nti bamuboola nti si muganda waabwe era bamugoba n’awaka ng’ate akimanyi bulungi nti omugenzi Bazinduse

ye yali amuzaala kubanga n’ebbaluwa ye ey’obuzaale eraga nti omugenzi ye kitaawe.

Mabiriizi yasaba kkooti nti okuggyawo okusika omuguwa, omulambo gwa kitaawe guziikulwe, baguggyeko akagumba ke baba bakozesa okukebera endagabutonde,

abeeyita abaana b’omugenzi Bazinduse bonna bategeerekeke kuba naye teyeekakasa obanga omugenzi ye yali azaala baganda be abamu nga pasita Male.

Omulamuzi wa kkooti ento e Mukono, Paul Matyama yakkiriza eky’abaana b’omugenzi bonna okutwalibwa ku ndagabutonde wabula n’agaana eky’okuziikula omugenzi kubanga yafa bulwadde bwa COVID 19.

Wano okujulira we kuva nga pasita Male awakanya eky’okumutwala ku DNA ate

Mabiriizi ye akiwagira naye agamba nti balina kusooka kufuna ggumba lya kitaawe,

abakugu bakebere abaana bonna nga baligeraageranyaako.

title: Eyali omusambi wa Uganda Cranes Savio Kabugo ayanjuddwa kabi
content:
EMYAKA 15 ng’eyaliko omuzibizi wa Cranes Savio Kabugo, eby’okwanjulwa abisala ekikuubo, yamaze nakkiriza kabiite we Leila Nakyanzi n’amulagayo mu butongole eri bakadde be, ku mukolo gaggadde ogwasombodde abawanvu n’abampi.
Kaabadde kaseera ka ssanyu naddala eri Nakyanzi, bakira buli lw’afuluma okujja eri abagenyi ng’asaba obuyimba okuli; ‘Katonda y’abadde mw’eno ensonga’ ate nti ‘Nina bingi by’otanalaba’, ‘Owooma’ olwa Geosteady, ‘Muwoomya’ olwa Sheebah ne King Saha, ‘long time’ olwa Reign n’endala zonna nga zirumya.
Savio Kabugo en kabite we Nakyanzi
Kyayitiridde mu bulamu bwa Nakyanzi, omwami we Kabugo bwe yatuuse okuleeta ebirabo eri abazadde ebyajjuzza oluggya. Ate Kabugo bwe yasabuukuludde kapyata w’emmotoka ekika kya Toyota Harrier Hybrid n’agisimba Nakyanzi, amaziga gaakulukuse ffamire yonna nga buli omu yeewuunya omukwano Kabugo.
Omukolo gwabadde mu maka ga Sarah Jamida n’omugenzi Dalausi Katongole abazaala Nakyanzi ku kyalo Kikaaya mu muluka gw’e Kisaasi mu munisipaali y’e Kawempe mu disitulikiti y’e Kampala.
Savio Kabugo ng'ali en Kabiite we Nakyanzi ku mukolo gw'okwanjula kwabwe
“Omukazi namufuna mu 2010, mbadde nkooye okubuuka emyala nga neebalama bazadde be, anti nali nakyala naye ennaku z’okwanjula ne ziyitako, wabula neebaza Katonda nti kiwedde, kati njagala Nakyanzi anzaalire ttiimu y’omupiira omuli n’abalongo, embaga y’eddako,” Kabugo bwe yategeezezza.
Kabugo azannyiddeko kiraabu nnyingi wano mu ggwanga okuli; SC Villa, SC Victoria University, URA FC, Proline, Lugazi ne Ntebbe UPPC. Yaliko ku pulo mu; AS Vita Club (Kinshasa – DR Congo), Sebeta Kanema (Ethiopia) ne Jwaneng Galaxy (Botswana).
Cranes yagyegattako mu 2013 nga Uganda ezannya ogw’omukwano ne Rwanda, yazannya CHAN wa 2014, World Cup qualifiers 2017 n’empaka nnyingi wabula obuvune lwe bwamulemesa

title: Bannayuganda 1000 abali e Cambodia banoonya ssente zibakomyawo
content:
BANNAYUGANDA abasoba mu 1,000 gakyabeesibidde e Cambodia olw’okubulwa ssente ezisasula tiketi z’ennyonyi ezibakomyawo wadde nga bakkiriziddwa okutambula nga tebalina mpapula ziboogerako ne basonyiyibwa n’engassi.

Omubaka wa Uganda e Malaysia, Betty Bigombe era nga y’avunaanyizibwa ku mawanga okuli; Cambodia, Myanmar ne Vietnam yategeezezza Bukedde nti, Cambodia yakkirizza okuwa ekisonyiwo Bannayuganda abali mu ggwanga eryo mu bukyamu.

Embeera okuboonoonekera kyava ku Gavumenti ya America okussa akazito ku Cambodia nti, yaakubakolako singa tebalwanyisa bafere. Gavumenti ya Cambodia yatandika ebikwekweto era bangi ku bakulira kkampuni z’abafere ng’abasinga baali Bachina abadduka Bannayuganda ne basigala nga tebalina gye balaga era bangi baakwatibwa ate abalala basiiba n’okusula ku nguudo.

Gye buvuddeko, Bigombe yawandiikira Gavumenti ya Cambodia ng’abasaba bakkirize Bannayuganda abaayingizibwa mu bukyamu okufuluma nga tebagguddwaako musango. Olw’okuba nga bangi tebaalina mpapula ate nga n’abazirina zaayitako, bwe bakwatibwa batanzibwa ssente nnyingi ze batalina.

Bigombe yakakasizza Bukedde nga Cambodia bwe yakkirizza okuwa Bannayuganda bonna empapula z’ebitambuliso nga bavaayo. Buli lunaku lw’omala e Cambodia nga lusukka mu ze walina okubeerayo, bakusasuza 37,000/- mu za Uganda. Waliwo abawezezza emyaka n’okusingawo era baabadde balina okusasula ssente eziri mu bukadde.

“Twalagira Bannayuganda batandike okwewandiisa ku kitebe kyaffe era 700 ku bo baakikoze, kyokka omuwendo tugusuubira okweyongerako kuba waliwo abali mu nkambi z’Abachina. Kyokka kye balina okumanya tewali Munnayuganda, Gavumenti gw’egenda kusasulira tiketi emuzza,” Bigombe bwe yagambye.

Kyokka yalaze okutya nti, ekisonyiwo ekyabaweereddwa abamu bayinza obutakiganyulwamu singa tebayambibwako kuba tebalina ssente.“Bangi basula njala ku nguudo olw’ebbulwa ly’ensimbi. Tusaba ebitongole ebigabi by’obuyambi, abeng’anda n’abazirakisa okubayamba,” Bigombeb bwe yagasseeko.

WALIWO ABEEGULIDDE TIKETI

Kenny Oloka, akulira ekitongole ky’obwannakyewa ekya Kyeyo Innitiative Uganda ekirwanirira bankubakyeyo yagambye nti, waliwo Bannayuganda 50 abeegulidde tiketi era basuubirwa okutuuka ku butaka wakati wa February 20 ne 25, 2026. Okusoomoozebwa okulala kwe balina, y’endabirira y’abantu abali e Cambodia kuba tebalina kye balya n’okusula. Okutya okulala, tebamanyi kisonyiwo lwe kinaggwaako kuba kiyinza okuggwaako nga tebannafuna ssente zibakomyawo. Oloka agamba nti, Bannayuganda abamu baasuubizibwa ssente eziri wakati wa doola za America 1,000 ne 2,000 (3,500,000/- ne 7,000,000/-). Abaalinnyira e Ntebe baabawa ‘visit visa’, ne babakolera ku mpapula endala nga tebategedde nti, bakukusibwa. Bwe baatuuka e Cambodia baatwalibwa mu nkambi nga tebasobola kuvaayo. Baabalagira okutandika okufera mu kkampuni z’Abachina n’okusikiriza bannaabwe okubeeyungako.

Omuntu gy’akoma okuyingiza ssente n’ensako, kyokka obuzibu ne bw’ofuna ssente tolina bw’oziweereza.

ABALI E CAMBODIA BALAAJANA

Munnayuganda eya...

title: Chamilli atabukidde Nobat events n'amusaba amuggye mu mboozi
content:
JOSE Chameleone atabukidde omutegesi w’ebivvulu Nobert Twizire amanyiddwa nga Nobat Events, n’amusaba amuggye mu mboozi ze.
Kino kiddiridde Nobat, okuyita ku mitimbagano gya yintanenti, n’ategeeza nti Chamilli yalimba Pulezidenti Museveni nga bw’alina abavubuka ba Ghetto mbu ng’ate tabalina. Nti ate era, Chamilli alina ky’amanyi ku muvubuka eyafiira ewuwe.
Chamilli agamba nti yeewuunya Nobat gye yava okumussaako obukyayi n’atuuka okumwogerako ebikyamu.
Yamulabudde nti bw’ataakikomye, waakweyongerayo mu mateeka, bamukoleko. Wabula ne Nobat akikkaatiriza nti tajja kumutiisatisa kuba by’ayogera, abirinako bwino.

title: Amyuka ssentebe wa Disitulikiti ye Mityana akwatiddwa lwakuw
content:
AKAKIIKO akalwanyisa obuli bw’enguzi mu maka g’obwa Pulezidenti aka State House Anti-Corruption Unit kakutte omumyuka wa ssentebe wa disitulikiti ye Mityana Annie Miriam Lugendo n’abakulira akakiiko akagaba emirimu aka District Service Commission.
Omwogezi w’akakiiko Mariam Natasha yagambye nti baakutte abantu bana okuli; Lugendo, ssentebe w’akakiiko akagaba emirimu Fred Lwasampijja, omuwandiisi w’akakiiko Hussein Mukiibi ne memba w’akakiiko Andrew Ssekibuule.
Ensonga ezaabakwasizza z’ekuusa ku kugabira emirimu abooluganda n’emikwano ne balekawo abalala abasinga obusobozi.
Kuno kwe bagatta n’okuggya ku bantu ssente nga babasuubizza okubawa emirimu egiba girangiddwa.
Joseph Luzige ssntebe omulonde owa Disitulikiti ye Mityana
Lugendo agambibwa okukozesa ekifo kye eky'omumyuka wa Ssentebe wa District n'afunira Sam Lugendo omulimu ogw'okukulira abalambuzi b'amasomero mu disitulikiti ye Mityana.
Natasha yagambye nti okunoonyereza kukyagenda mu maaso era bye banaazuula bye bijja okusalawo kye bazzaako.
Okubakwata kuddiridde eyawangudde obwa ssentebe bwa disitulikiti ye Mityana, Joseph Luzige okuwandiikira Kaliisoliiso wa Gavumenti n’ebitongole bya Gavumenti ebyenjawulo ng’abasaba bayimirize mbagirewo entegeka y’okuwandiika abakozi abapya aba disitulikiti okutuusa ng’amaze okunoonyereza ku mivuyo egyogerwako.
Ebimu ku byalumiriza akakiiko y’enkola y’okuwa emirimu abooluganda n’emikwano gy’abakulembeze bannabyabufuzi n’abakozi ba Gavumenti ne bwe kiba nga waliwo abalala abasinga ebisaanyizo

title: Nameere azzizza omuliro ku bamuyeeya okuwasa 'mutabani' we
content:
KWABADDE kusagambiza nga Justin Nameere ayanjula Kennedy Nsubuga mu maka ga bazadde be e Lukaya mu Kalungu.
Kennedy omwaka oguwedde bwe yakyala mu maka ge gamu yasuubiza bazadde ba Nameere okuddayo ng’omwaka gwakatandika era yakituukirizza.
Abantu bangi baakwatiridde ku kkubo erigenda mu bazadde ba Nameere okwerabira ku bagenyi abaabadde banyumye n’okuvuga emmotoka ez’ebbeeyi.
Nameere Ne Bba Bwe Baabadde Ku Kwanjula.
Rema Namakula ye yakulembeddemu abayimbi abaasanyusizza abagole n’abagenyi omwabade n’omugagga Godfrey Kirumira.
Omukolo olwawedde, Nameere n’agenda ku mukutu gwe ogwa ‘X’ kwe yayiye ebifaananyi ng’amema n’ekyebbeeyi kye. Abamu bakira bamuyozaayoza ng’abalala bwe bamuyeeya mbu yayanjudde ‘mutabani we’.
Wabula naye teyabalwisizza eby’obugole n’abissa ku bbali n’abaanukuza obukambwe omwabadde n’ebigambo ebirumira!

title: Bataddewo obukadde 10 eri oyo anaaleeta amawulire ku muserikale eyatta abantu 4!
content:
Omuduumizi w'ekitongole ky'amakomera mu ggwanga, Dr. Johnson Byabashaija, ataddewo obukadde 10 eri oyo anaabawa amawulire agaakwatagana ku muserikale w'ekitongole kino, agambibwa okukuba abantu baana amasasi agaabatta e Kiboga.

Ettemu lino, lyaliwo wiiki nga bbiri eziyise e Kiboga, omuserikale nnamba 13544 Moses Anguyo, gy'agambibwa okukubira amasasi amyuka mukama we, n'amudirira, mukama we n'omwana waabwe n'abatta.

Yasuulawo emmundu n'ebyambalo n'abulawo era ng'okuva olwo, bamunoonya. Omwogezi w'ekitongole ky'amakomera mu ggwanga, Frank Baine, agambye nti bataddewo ekirabo kya bukadde 10 eri oyo abeera amulabye nga bategeeza, aboobuyinza.

title: Kkampuni 100 ze zigenda okwolesereza mu ‘Dutch Village’
content:
KKAMPUNI, abawanguzi b’empaka z’omulimi asinga n’ebitongole ebisoba mu 100 bye bigenda okwolesa mu kibanja kya Budaaki (Dutch Village) mu mwoleso gwa Harvest Money.

Omubaka wa Budaaki mu Uganda, Frederieke Quispel agamba nti kkampuni zino ziviira ddala Budaaki, eza kuno nga zirina enkolagana ne Budaaki kwossa abawanguzi b’empaka zino eb’emyaka gyonna. Omwoleso gwa Harvest Money ogutegekebwa Vision Group etwala ne Bukedde wamu n’ekitebe kya Budaaki mu Uganda nga gwakubeerawo okuva nga February 27 - March 1, 2026 ku kisaawe e Kololo nga gwakukuleetera abantu bonna abaliko kye bakola mu bulunzi n’obulimi.

Ogw’omwaka guno gusasuliddwa kkampuni ya Tunga Nutrition, Engineering Solutions

(ENGSOL), Pearl Bank, Uganda Development Corporation ne aBi Development. Okuyingira omwoleso guno osasula 10,000/- ate n’okwetaba mu misomo eginaategekebwa buli lunaku osasula 10,000/- olunaku.

Quispel agamba nti abagenda okwoleso baakulaga ebintu eby’enjawulo okutandikira ku tekinologiya akozesebwa mu bulimi n’obulunzi, okutandikira ku nsigo ennongooseemu, ebijimusa, ebyuma ebigatta ku mutindo okutuuka ku butale.

“Abalimi n’abalunzi abaawangula empaka z’Omulimi Asinga ne bagenda e Budaaki nabo baakwolesa n’okwogera n’okuwa abaagala okuzeetabamu amagezi bawangule ate n’okuyamba bizinensi ezikola amagoba okusinziira ku ngeri bo gye bakikolamu,”

bw’agamba.

Quispel agamba nti nga Budaaki nsi ntono ddala okusinga Uganda ate nga terina mbeera

ya budde nnungi, sizoni ebbiri, ettaka ejjimu n’ebirala kyokka ekwata kyakubiri mu nsi yonna okufuna mu bulimi n’obulunzi. Uganda esobola okufuuka eggwanga erisinga okufulumya ebiva mu bulimi n’obulunzi mu Africa singa Bannayuganda banaatandika okubikola nga bizinensi.

Nga omwaka oguwedde, Quispel agamba nti baakuwa ebirabo eri aboolesi mu kibangirizi kyabwe ‘Dutch Village’ abanaasinga okukwata ku bavubuka, obuyiiya ate n’okugatta omutindo ku bye bakola nga babasiima n’okusikiriza abalala. Fiona Tamale,n akulira eby’ebivvulu mu Vision Group agamba nti nga abategesi, baakuwa aboolesi ababadde n’omwoleso guno okumala ebbanga ebirabo nga emu ku ngeri y’okujaguza emyaka 10 egy’omwoleso. Quispel ayita buli alina bizinensi n’abaagala okutandika ezitambulira ku bulimi n’obulunzi okweyiwa mu bungi mu mwoleso guno kuba eby’okuyiga ntoko.

title: Ebyana biraze emibiri mu kutongoza kampeyini y'okusimba emit
content:
EBYAANA biraze emibiri mu kaweefube w’okutongoza kampeyini y’okusimba emiti okutaasa obutonde bwensi ekuliddwa Dr. Dennis Daniel Ssemugenyi.
Kaweefube bamutandise na bimu mwe bagenda okugabira endokwa z’emiti ezisoba mu kakadde eri abagenda okwetaba mu kivvulu ekituumiddwa 'Simba omuti otaase obutonde bw’ensi' e Lugogo. Buli agenda mu kivvulu bagenda kumuwa endokwa z’emiti za bwereere.
Dr. Ssemugenyi yalangiridde nti ayagala buli kibangirizi ekiri mu bibuga okutandikira ku Kampala , Masaka Jinja n’ebibuga ebirala babimukirize okubijjuzaamu emiti. “ebibangirizi ebimu njagala babinguze bisimbemu ebibira wakati mu kibuga okutaasa obutonde bw’ensi nga Gavumenti y’ebirabirira.
Akwasiddwa omulimu gw’okukunga abadigize Abbey Musinguzi yabaddewo n'ategeeza nti ayagala buli mudigize mu sizoni eno asimbe emiti egyenkanankana n’emyaka gye gye yaakamala ku nsi ate buli bw'aba ng’agenda kukuza mazaalibwa buli mwaka asimbe emiti.

title: Abakkiriza mu Kristo beeswanta kivvulu kya Ada Edi okuva e Nigeria
content:
Ada eyakuyimbira ennyimba omuli "I will sing, Congratulation, Cheta, Jesus (you are able), Only you Jesus, I testify, I Overcame, I will sing (refreshed) n'endala nnyingi essaawa yonna asuubira okutonnya mu Uganda.

Ono yatadde obubaka ku mukutu gwe ogwa 'Twitter' obugamba nti; "Uganda family, mbeesunze byansusso, twesangeyo e Lugogo.."

Ada y'omu ku bayimbi ba 'Gospel' abaliko mu Africa yonna olw'ennyimba ze ez'okusinza eziryowa emyoyo, okuzzaamu amaanyi n'essuubi wamu n'ezo ezibinusa abatemi b'omubali.

Ekivvulu kye kimu kugenda kubaako abayimbi ba Gospel bangi mu Uganda, wamu ne ba DJ ba 'Gospel' nga tiketi esookerwako ya 30,000 ate ey'ekikungu (VIP) ya 150,000.

Ekivvulu kiwagiddwa Spirit Tv, New Vision wamu ne kkampuni endala.

title: Bebecool atongozza alubaamu y'ennyimba ezigenda okutunda ku katale k'ensi yonna
content:
OMUYIMBI Moses Ssali, amannya ge ku siteegi nga ye Bebecool atongozza olutambi lwe lwe yatuumye “Break The Chains” okuli ennyimba 16, nga zonna za lungereza olukyasinze okubeera olw’ebbeeyi mu Uganda.

Abamu Ku Bawagizi Ba Bebe Abaabaddeyo.

“Break The Chains” kitegeeza okukutula enjere, Bebe Cool yabadde agezaako okutegeeza nti ennyimba ze zino 16, eziri ku lutambi lwe luno ze zigenda okukutula enjere ze asobole muziki we okuvuganya ku katale k’e nsi yonna omuli n’amawanga g’e Bulaaya.

Mummy Zuena N'abaana Be , Alpha Ku (kkono) Ne Beata

Amerika n’ensi za Afrika zonna omuli ne Nigeria gye yakoledde ezimu ku nnyimba zino eggwanga ku lukalu lwa Afrika mu kiseera kino omusinga okuva abayimbi ab’amaanyi abavuganya n’abazungu.

Yalutongozza ku Lwokuna ku bbaala ya Noni Vie e Lugogo okumpi ne Forest Mall nga yayise mikwano gye abayimbi ab’amaanyi.

Chamilli Ng'abuuza Ku Sseguya Owa Bukedde Ku Mukolo Guno.

Kuno bano kwabaddeko Dr. Jose Chameleon, Juliana Kanyomozi, Cindy, Aplus, Baraka, Alien Skin n’abalala gattako abanene mu ggwanga abawagira endongo okwabadde Hajjati Hadijah Namyalo akulira offiisi ya ssentebe wa NRM mu Uganda , bannamawulire n’abasuubuzi okuwuliriza ennyimba ze zino nga bwa zibannyonnyola kye zitegezza lumu ku lumu.

Bebe Cool agamba nti bwe yali atandika okuyimba yalowoozanga nti okufuuka owaakabi olina kukwata kazindaalo n’oyimba naye bw’otuuka ku muziki ogukubibwa ku katale k’ensi yonna biralamu.

Alien Skin Ng'abuuza Ku Bebe.

Yategeezezza nti ng’oggyeeko okubeera n’ekitone, kyetagisaamu ssente nnyingi n’okugenda mu mawanga agamanyi eky’okukola gy’obeera okoleera ennyimba zino.

Ezimu ku nnyimba Bebe Cool ya zikwatidde Nigeria ne Bungereza eri abakugu mu kutabula ebirungo mu muziki abakoleera n’omuyimbi Davido naye beeyakozesezza.

Oluyimba lwe olusooka ku lutambi “Break The Chains” baluyita “Boy Like Me” yagambye nti yabadde annyonnyola omugaso gw’omwana ow’obulenzi kubanga abantu abasinga balwanirira mwana muwala yekka.

Baakubye N'ebiriro.

Save My Soul, yaluyimbira muwala we Beata Ssali eyali omulwadde mu kaseera ekyo we yakoleera ennyimba zino e Bulaaya ne yeegayirira Katonda ataase omwana we ono, Afrika Love ft Yemi Alade , yabadde aluyimbira mukyala we Zuena, kw’ogatta n’ennyimba endala okuli ; “Zero Omission, Cheque ft Joshua Baraka, Game it DJ EDU, Hips Don’t Lie, Home, Body Bounce, Circumfrence, Motivation, Alright, Hidden Agendas, Wait & Rectangle Love”.

title: Mesach asekeredde abalowooza nti omuziki gwa bbandi gwaggwaa
content:
Ababadde bawoza mbu myuziki wa bbandi yagwa, Mesach Ssemakula abasekeredde n’abagamba nti ye ssaawa beetereze mu ngeri gye battannyaamu ensonga.
Mesach Ng'ayimba Ku Big Zone E Nansana.
Okwogera bino Mesach yabadde Zana ku wooteri ya Front Page ku Ssande bwe yabadde akomekkerezza ebivvulu bye ebya Mesach at 46 mwe yafunidde abantu abangi kyenkana mu buli kitundu mwe yayimbidde.
Mesach Ng'acamula Ab'oku Big Zone E Nansana.
Wikendi yagimazeeko adigiza Bannakampala. Ku Lwomukaaga yali Nansana ku Big Zone ate ku Ssande n’agenda e Zana.
Omuzeeyi Ng'asitudde Omukazi.
Mesach yagambye nti abantu oluusi boogera nnyo nga tebasoose kukola kunoonyereza ne weesanga nga omuntu akoze sitatimenti enkyamu kubanga. Yayongeddeko nti ssinga bye boogera ku muziki ono bituufu, yandibadde tafuna bantu mu bungi ng abwe baabadde.
Abawagizi Basanyuse E Zana Okulaba Ku Spice Diana Okukakana Ng'abamu Bamusitudde.
Endongo gye yasumuludde e Nansana abazeeyi baayo teyabalese kye kimu okukkakkana nga batandise okuzina pakacini. Waliwo omulala eyalabibwako ng’agezaako okusitula omuwala ate waliwo omulala eyalabibwako ng’agezaako okusitula omuwala era nawaga nnyo ng’olwo endongo emusensedde.
Ababaka Ssegirinya ne Ssewanyana bacamudde nnyo abadigize abagenze ku Front Page bwe balinnye siteegi okufuuwa omuyimbi Maureen Nantume olwo ne batemerayo dansi naye ng’eno enduulu mu bantu bw’ekubwa empitirivu.
Ono yasazeeko Ssegirinya ng'amulabye.
Ssegirinya yasanze akaseera akazibu okuddayo mu kifo we yabadde atudde anti abakazi abatasoose kumulaba ng’agenda ku siteegi baamusazeeko nga balinga abamusaba abeeko by’abayambamu era naye yabawadde obudde.
Abayimbi okuli Spice Diana, Eddy Yawe, Sasha Brighton, Maureen Nantume n’abalala be baawerekeddeko Mesach nga yeebazizza abantu bonna abaamubeereddewo okukakasa nti ebivvulu bye biba bya maanyi.

title: Basabye Palamenti ku yinsuwa y’obulamu
content:
ABAKUGU mu bya yinsuwa basabye ababaka ba Palamenti abaalondeddwa basoosowaze yinsuwa y'ebyobulamu kisobozese Bannayuganda okufuna obujjanjabi obulungi.
Bano okuva mu kkampuni za yinsuwa ez'enjawulo, baasinzidde mu nsisikano gye baabaddemu mu Kampala okukubaganya ebirowoozo ku biteekeddwa okukolebwa okwongera okwagazisa Bannayuganda okwettanira enkola za yinsuwa omuli n'ebyobulamu.
Abakugu mu bya yinsuwa mu bubaka bwabwe obwasomeddwa akulira Jubilee Insuarance, Eugine Mutekere, baategeezezza nti, Bannayuganda bangi tebannamanya bukulu bwa yinsuwa. Baagambye nti, ssinga Gavumenti eteekawo yinsuwa y'ebyobulamu, kijja kubazuukusa bamanye amakulu gaayo.
Mutekere yayongeddeko nti, abantu bwe banaategeera yinsuwa ezisobola okubayamba nga bagudde ku bibamba, kijja kukendeeza omuwendo gw’abo abalaajanira Gavumenti okubadduukirira nga bafunye obuzibu.
Aba yinsuwa era baayogedde ku nteekateeka gye balina okwongera okusomesa Bannayuganda ku bukulu bw'okwettanira enkola za yinsuwa ez'enjawulo.

title: Elijah Kitaka alumbye siteegi ng’empale agisibizza muguwa n’atabula abadigize
content:
Empale ya Elijah Kitaka emazeeko abadigize ebyewungula mu kivvulu kya Bell Oba Fest ekyamaze ennaku 3.

Kino kyabadde ku Jahazi Pier e Munyonyo era Kitaka y’omu ku bayimbi abaacamudde abantu okumala ennaku 3 ng’abalala kwabaddeko; Winnie Nwagi, Bebe Cool, Blu 3, Vinka ne Azawi.

Abawala Abaabaddeyo Nga Banyumirwa.

Ku Lwomukaaga nga lwe lwali olunaku lw’ekivvulu olwokubiri, Kitaka kwe yayimbira kyokka ennyambala yaleka bangi boogera obutonotono ng’abamu bagamba amanyi ‘fasoni’ ate abalala nti omusajja tagwa eddalu.

Ono yajja ayambadde empale gye yali atemyeko ng’ekoma mu maviivi kyokka ng’asibyeko omuguwa ogwakola ng’omusipi. Aboogezi tebaamuggye ku mulamwa era abadigize yabakubye omuziki.

Yagenze okuva ku kazindaalo nga bawoza kimu nti; “Lwa kwambala nga mulalu naye omusajja ayimba...” Ekivvulu kino ekigatta obuwangwa bw’Abagirimaani obw’okunywa omwenge n’obwa kuno kyajjumbiddwa ng’abantu bwe bawuuta ebbidde.

title: Lutalo akubye ab'e Masaka omuziki ogulaludde bi maama!! ; Ab
content:
Ku ssaawa 10:00 emiryango gyabadde giggudwawo era we zaaweredde esaawa essatu ng’emiryango gyonna gimaze okuggalwa anti ekifo nga kijjudde olwo endongo n’etandika okukaaba.
Bano abavubuka baawalampye loole okwerabira ku Lutalo ng'akuba omuziki.
Band aya Da Hares omuli abayimbi nga Bent Agie, Joram Kaweesa , Deozo,Charles Ssekyewa,Willy Mukaabya ne Kazibwe kapo be baasoose okusanyusa abantu.
Lutalo yalinnye ku siteegi ku ssaawa 4:00 era nga yatandikidde ku buyimba bwa ddiini. Yasoose kwebaza Katonda amuwadde omukisa ate n’abawa n’obudde obulungi obubayambye okukuba endongo obulungi.
Bino bimaama byabadde byeyagala mu kivvulu.
Ono yakubye ennyimba nga Mukama Katonda ggwe Afuga,Yesu Mukama. Nandikulese mu Kyalo, Kwasa, Ensi, Gunsitula n’endala era wano yasoose kuwummulamu.
Wano abayimbi abalala naddala bannamasaka okwabadde Eddy Kenzo, King Saha , Betty Mpologoma ,Mathias Walukagga n’abalala bawerekeddeko Lutalo.
Oba lwaki bimaama byettanira nnyo Lutalo!!!!!
Mu kitundu eky’okubiri. Lutalo yakomyewo ku siteegi wakati mu nduulu okuva mu bawagizi era yakomyewo ne mwana muwala Shakirah Shakirah ne bayimba oluyimba lwa Am in Love lwe balina bombi era bakira obwedda bayimbi bwe beeraga omukwano ecamudde ennyo abantu.
Lutalo yakubye ennyimba ze empya n’enkadde ppaaka ku lwa Kabisi ka Ndagala. Ekivvulu kya Kabisi ka Ndagala kyawagiddwa kkampuni ya Vision Group ekola ne Bukedde.
Omugagga Lwasa naye yabaddeyo mu kivvulu!
Shakira Shakira ali luno! Wano ng'anyeenya ku kiwato bwe baabadde bayimba bombi.

title: Eyakwakudde ensawo eyabaddemu obukadde 21 poliisi emukutte
content:
ABABBI abatambulira ku bodabooda balondodde omukazi abadde yakaaggya obukadde 21 mu bbanka ne bamukwakkulako ensawo badduke kyokka poliisi n’etaayizaako omu n’emukwata

Ssente ezaabadde mu nsawo Wagaba ze yanyakudde.

Bino byabaddewo ggulo ku Lwokutaano e Najeera omukyala Deborah Nakawombe bwe yagenze mu bbanka e Ntinda n’aggyayo ssente obukadde 21 n’apangisa bodabooda okumutwala wabula ababbi nabo ne bamugoberera n’ekigendererwa eky’okuzimubbako.

Amyuka Omwogezi wa poliisi mu Kampala n’emiriraano, Luke Owoyesigyire yagambye nti Nakawombe bwe yavude e Ntinda yayolekedde e Buwaate gy’asula kyokka yabadde atuuka e Najjeera ne wabaawo bodaboda okwabadde abantu babiri ne batukako ku misinde emiyitirivu gwe babadde baweese n’amusikambulako ensawo.

Wagaba gwe baakutte n'ensawo.

Yagambye nti ababi bano tebaabaddemu yadde okutya kuba Nakwombe bamusikambuddeko ensawo e okumpi n’essundiro ly’amafuta eritali wala ne poliisi era nga yamuviiriddeko okukuba enduulu abaserikale ne basitukiramu.

Yategeezezza ni abaserikale baataayizza ababbi bano ne bakwata Hussein Wagaba 27, abaeera e Kayunga mu Wakiso ng’ono ye yakwakkudde ensawo omwabadde ssente okuva ku Nakawombe wabula eyabadde avuga nadduka nga yakozesezza akakisa nti oluguudo lwabaddeko ebidduka bingi nga abaserikale tebasobola kufulumya masasi.

Yagambye nti waliwo obubinja bw’ababbi obuteega abantu wabweru wa bbanka ssaako obulondoola abatambula ne ssente enyingi nga akabinja akalondoola omusajja ke kamubbako ensawo omwali ssente mu ppaaka ya ggwanda mu Kisenyi.

Yalabudde abantu okusooka okwekenneenya embeera wamu n’abantu be balaba wabweru wa bbanka kuba abamu ku bo babeera babbi nga abo abaabadde banyakudde ensawo ku Nakawombe.

title: Etteeka ly'okulonda akulira oludda oluvuganya mu palamenti l
content:
Etteeka ly'omubaka lumu ery'okulonda akulira oludda oluvuganya mu palamenti likomyewo buto
Etteeka ly’omubaka Richard Lumu mw’ayagalira ebibiina by’oludda oluvuganya ebirina ababaka mu Palamenti okwetaba mu kulonda akulira oludda oluvuganya gavumenti mu Palamenti likomyewo.
Olukangaga okuli ebintu Palamenti by’egenda okukolako ng’ettudde ku Lwokuna lwa wiiki eno, ensonga nnamba 11, lye tteeka lya Lumu ery’okukola ennongoosereza mu tteeka erirung’amya entambuza y’emirimu mu Palamenti erya Administration of Parliament Act.
Lumu mu buwaayiro bwe yateeka mu tteeka lino, kuliko eky’okuwa ababaka bonna ab’oludda oluvuganya obuyinza okwetaba mu kulonda abakulira mu Palamenti, wabula ng’ekibiina ekisinze ababaka abangi ku ludda oluvuganya kye kireeta amannya g’abantu basatu, bo ababaka ne bakuba akalulu, asinze n’abakulira.
Wabula akawaayiro kano kaliko okusika omuguwa okw’amaanyi, nga bannabyabufuzi naddala abava mu kibiina kya NUP, bagamba nti kano kakodyo ka gavumenti okunafuya oludda oluvuganya, okuyita mu kuba n’omukono ku ani alina okutwala ekifo kino.
Era NUP egamba nti ssinga wabaawo akalulu, ebya Uganda nga bwe biba, wasobola okubaawo okugulirira ababaka n’ekigendererwa eky’okubasendasenda balonde omuntu gavumenti gwewuliriramu emirembe.
Lumu era mu biteeso bye ayagala ofiisi y’akulira oludda oluvuganya gavumenti ebeeko omutemwa gwa ssente ogugiteekebwamu, agirimu abeere n’obusobozi okudduukirira ku bannayuganda n’okubawagira mu bye bakola.
Era ayagala omuntu akutte eky’okubiri mu kalulu k’obwapulezidenti ayingire butereevu Palamenti ssinga abeera afunye obululu obuweza ebitundu 50 ku 100 ku bw’oyo abeera awangudde.
Palamenti ey’awamu egenda kukubaganya ebirowoozo ku tteeka lya Lumu lino, era esalewo oba eriyisa oba erigaana.
